As the cloud entrance, today’s cloud gateways have integrated multiple functions such as elastic public access and load balancing to cope with the rapid growth of services and requirements. To meet the demands of large-scale clouds for efficient packet forwarding, scalable state management, and high resilience, we design, deploy, and operate Tencent Gateway (TGW), an efficient and resilient cloud gateway at scale. Compared to other large cloud providers that primarily offer services like search, e-commerce, or short-form video, the "killer services" of Tencent Cloud are online gaming and live streaming, which come with much stricter requirements for latency, jitter, and packet loss. From a technological perspective, TGW is highly decoupled and modular, with core components focused on efficient forwarding planes, a scalable state migration mechanism, a resilient failure recovery mechanism, and a failure detection and localization system. In terms of engineering, TGW has been operating in large-scale, real-world industrial environments for eight years, during which we have gained extensive insights and experience. We evaluate TGW both in testbed and real-world scenarios. In our testbed, TGW's single node achieves 2.9× the forwarding capacity of prior systems. Between clusters, states and traffic can be migrated in 4 s without packet loss. In our real-world environment, TGW handles tens of Tbps of traffic, with a worst-case packet drop rate ranging from 10 -7 to 10 -4 , while balancing traffic across clusters. Additionally, TGW can quickly migrate states and traffic and recover from failures without tenant awareness, guided by our failure localization system, achieving 100% availability for years.
papers.abstract_zh: 大规模云数据中心已成为重要的互联网基础设施。如今的云网关作为云的入口，集成了弹性公网访问、负载均衡等多种功能，以应对业务和需求的快速增长。为了满足大规模云对高效数据包转发、可扩展状态管理和高弹性的需求，我们设计、部署和运营腾讯网关（TGW），这是一种高效、弹性的大规模云网关。与其他主要提供搜索、电商、短视频等服务的大型云提供商相比，腾讯云的“杀手级业务”是网络游戏、直播等，对时延、抖动、丢包等要求更加严格。从技术角度来看，TGW具有高度解耦和模块化的特点，其核心组件集中于高效的转发平面、可扩展的状态迁移机制、弹性的故障恢复机制以及故障检测和定位系统。在工程方面，TGW已经在大规模、真实的工业环境中运行了八年，在此期间我们获得了丰富的见解和经验。我们在测试台和现实场景中评估 TGW。在我们的测试平台中，TGW的单节点转发能力是现有系统的2.9倍。集群之间状态和流量可以在4秒内完成迁移，不丢包。在我们的现实环境中，TGW 处理数十 Tbps 的流量，最坏情况下的丢包率范围为 10 -7 到 10 -4 ，同时平衡集群之间的流量。此外，在我们的故障定位系统的指导下，TGW 可以在租户不知情的情况下快速迁移状态和流量并从故障中恢复，实现多年的 100% 可用性。

papers.title: The Koala Benchmarks for the Shell: Characterization and Implications.
papers.abstract: KOALA is a benchmark suite aimed at performance-oriented research targeting the Unix and Linux shell. It combines a systematic collection of diverse shell programs collected from tasks found out in the wild, various real inputs to these programs facilitating small and large deployments, extensive analysis and characterization aiding their understanding, and additional infrastructure and tooling aimed at usability and reproducibility in systems research. The KOALA benchmarks perform a variety of common shell tasks; they combine all major language features of the POSIX shell; they use a variety of POSIX, GNU Coreutils, and third-party components; and they operate on inputs of varying size and composition—available on both permanent archival storage and scalable cloud storage. Applying KOALA to four systems aimed at accelerating shell programs offers a broader perspective on their trade-offs, generalizes their key results, and contributes to a better understanding of these systems.
papers.abstract_zh: KOALA 是一个基准测试套件，旨在针对 Unix 和 Linux shell 进行面向性能的研究。它结合了从野外发现的任务中收集的各种 shell 程序的系统集合、这些程序的各种实际输入，以促进小型和大型部署、帮助理解的广泛分析和表征，以及旨在系统研究中的可用性和可重复性的附加基础设施和工具。 KOALA 基准测试执行各种常见的 shell 任务；它们结合了 POSIX shell 的所有主要语言功能；他们使用各种 POSIX、GNU Coreutils 和第三方组件；它们对不同大小和组成的输入进行操作——可在永久档案存储和可扩展的云存储上使用。将 KOALA 应用于旨在加速 shell 程序的四个系统，为它们的权衡提供了更广阔的视角，概括了它们的关键结果，并有助于更好地理解这些系统。

papers.title: Toppings: CPU-Assisted, Rank-Aware Adapter Serving for LLM Inference.
papers.abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) is a popular approach that adapts a base large language model (LLM) to domain-specific tasks by adding lightweight trainable adapters. In this paper, we present Toppings, a system that efficiently serves many LoRA adapters derived from a common base model. Toppings pins the base model on GPUs and dynamically loads the requested LoRA adapters from host memory as new requests arrive. In view of the high GPU loading overhead, which not only delays the time-to-first-token of the newly arrived request but also interrupts the ongoing decoding of all inflight queries when continuous batching is in use, Toppings proposes a CPU-assisted LoRA serving approach. It simultaneously uses CPUs to compute the lightweight adaption for prefilling as the requested LoRA adapter is being loaded onto GPUs; it then switches to the GPUs after loading completes to resume the remaining computation. Toppings develops a highly optimized synchronization mechanism and pipeline loading scheme to efficiently coordinate LoRA computation on the CPUs and GPUs. Toppings further designs a rank-aware scheduling algorithm that optimally schedules heterogeneous LoRA requests to maximize the SLO attainment. Compared with the state-of-the-art LoRA serving systems, Toppings improves the average request serving latency by up to 1.7× and achieves an SLO attainment of up to 99%.
papers.abstract_zh: 低秩适应 (LoRA) 是一种流行的方法，通过添加轻量级可训练适配器，使基础大语言模型 (LLM) 适应特定于领域的任务。在本文中，我们介绍了 Toppings，这是一个可以有效地为源自通用基础模型的许多 LoRA 适配器提供服务的系统。 Toppings 将基本模型固定在 GPU 上，并在新请求到达时从主机内存动态加载所请求的 LoRA 适配器。鉴于 GPU 加载开销较高，不仅会延迟新到达请求的首次令牌时间，还会在使用连续批处理时中断所有正在进行的查询的持续解码，Toppings 提出了一种 CPU 辅助的 LoRA 服务方法。当请求的 LoRA 适配器加载到 GPU 上时，它同时使用 CPU 来计算用于预填充的轻量级适配；然后，它会在加载完成后切换到 GPU 以恢复剩余的计算。 Toppings 开发了高度优化的同步机制和管道加载方案，以有效协调 CPU 和 GPU 上的 LoRA 计算。 Toppings 进一步设计了一种排名感知调度算法，该算法可以优化调度异构 LoRA 请求，以最大化 SLO 的实现。与最先进的 LoRA 服务系统相比，Toppings 将平均请求服务延迟提高了 1.7 倍，并实现了高达 99% 的 SLO 目标。

papers.title: Torpor: GPU-Enabled Serverless Computing for Low-Latency, Resource-Efficient Inference.
papers.abstract: Serverless computing offers a compelling cloud model for online inference services. However, existing serverless platforms lack efficient support for GPUs, hindering their ability to deliver high-performance inference. In this paper, we present Torpor, a serverless platform for GPU-efficient, low-latency inference. To enable efficient sharing of a node’s GPUs among numerous inference functions, Torpor maintains models in main memory and dynamically swaps them onto GPUs upon request arrivals (i.e., late binding with model swapping). Torpor uses various techniques, including asynchronous API redirection, GPU runtime sharing, pipelined model execution, and efficient GPU memory management, to minimize latency overhead caused by model swapping. Additionally, we design an interference-aware request scheduling algorithm that utilizes high-speed GPU interconnects to meet latency service-level objectives (SLOs) for individual inference functions. We have implemented Torpor and evaluated its performance in a production environment. Utilizing late binding and model swapping, Torpor can concurrently serve hundreds of inference functions on a worker node with 4 GPUs, while achieving latency performance comparable to native execution, where each model is cached exclusively on a GPU. Pilot deployment in a leading commercial serverless cloud shows that Torpor reduces the GPU provisioning cost by 70% and 65% for users and the platform, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 无服务器计算为在线推理服务提供了引人注目的云模型。然而，现有的无服务器平台缺乏对 GPU 的有效支持，阻碍了其提供高性能推理的能力。在本文中，我们介绍了 Torpor，一个用于 GPU 高效、低延迟推理的无服务器平台。为了在众多推理功能之间实现节点 GPU 的高效共享，Torpor 在主内存中维护模型，并在请求到达时将它们动态交换到 GPU（即，模型交换的后期绑定）。 Torpor 使用各种技术，包括异步 API 重定向、GPU 运行时共享、流水线模型执行和高效 GPU 内存管理，以最大限度地减少模型交换引起的延迟开销。此外，我们设计了一种干扰感知请求调度算法，该算法利用高速 GPU 互连来满足各个推理功能的延迟服务级别目标 (SLO)。我们已经实现了 Torpor 并在生产环境中评估了它的性能。利用后期绑定和模型交换，Torpor 可以在具有 4 个 GPU 的工作节点上同时提供数百个推理功能，同时实现与本机执行相当的延迟性能，其中每个模型都专门缓存在 GPU 上。在领先的商业无服务器云中的试点部署表明，Torpor 为用户和平台分别降低了 70% 和 65% 的 GPU 配置成本。

papers.title: Towards High-Performance Transactional Stateful Serverless Workflows with Affinity-Aware Leasing.
papers.abstract: Function-as-a-Service (FaaS) is the most prevalent serverless computing paradigm, offering significant flexibility to develop, deploy, and operate cloud applications. However, traditional FaaS frameworks face significant challenges in operating transactional stateful workflows which often involve multiple functions with shared state. Previous solutions rely on external datastores to manage shared state, suffering from high communication overhead to guarantee transactional consistency for stateful workflows. In this paper, we present RTSFaaS, an RDMA-capable transactional stateful FaaS framework that achieves high performance while guaranteeing transactional consistency. RTSFaaS exploits a lease-based concurrency control protocol to dynamically assign and transfer leases among workers to achieve concurrency control. Specifically, RTSFaaS incorporates two key designs: (1) an affinity-aware lease assignment mechanism that improves the benefit of caching by dynamically assigning data leases to selected workers according to the data function affinity, and (2) an RDMA-capable dynamic lease transferring mechanism to reduce the cost of locking by serializing concurrent data accesses with one-sided RDMA primitives. Experimental results show that RTSFaaS achieves up to 5× and 20× performance speedup compared with state-of-the-art transactional stateful FaaS platforms–Boki and Beldi, and up to 1.7× and 2.1× performance improvement when their concurrency control protocols implemented for RDMA networks are applied to RTSFaaS.
papers.abstract_zh: 功能即服务 (FaaS) 是最流行的无服务器计算范例，为开发、部署和运营云应用程序提供了极大的灵活性。然而，传统的 FaaS 框架在操作事务性有状态工作流程时面临着重大挑战，这些工作流程通常涉及具有共享状态的多个功能。以前的解决方案依赖外部数据存储来管理共享状态，为了保证有状态工作流程的事务一致性，通信开销很高。在本文中，我们提出了 RTSFaaS，这是一种支持 RDMA 的事务状态 FaaS 框架，可在保证事务一致性的同时实现高性能。 RTSFaaS利用基于租约的并发控制协议在worker之间动态分配和转移租约以实现并发控制。具体来说，RTSFaaS 包含两个关键设计：(1) 亲和力感知租约分配机制，通过根据数据函数亲和力将数据租约动态分配给选定的工作线程来提高缓存的效益；(2) 支持 RDMA 的动态租约传输机制，通过使用单侧 RDMA 原语序列化并发数据访问来降低锁定成本。实验结果表明，与最先进的事务状态 FaaS 平台 Boki 和 Beldi 相比，RTSFaaS 实现了高达 5 倍和 20 倍的性能加速，并且当将针对 RDMA 网络实现的并发控制协议应用于 RTSFaaS 时，性能提升高达 1.7 倍和 2.1 倍。

papers.title: Towards Optimal Rack-scale μs-level CPU Scheduling through In-Network Workload Shaping.
papers.abstract: Rack-scale CPU scheduling has emerged as a promising direction to accommodate the increasing demands for microsecond-level services. However, prior work suffers from both inaccurate load balancing in the network and complex yet sub-optimal scheduling within each server due primarily to its application-agnosticism. This paper presents Pallas, an application-aware rack-scale CPU scheduling solution for microsecond-level services with near-optimal performance. At the heart of Pallas is an in-network workload shaping to partition the workload into different shards, each of them preserving high homogeneity regarding the CPU demands. With the shaped workloads, Pallas then performs simple yet near-optimal inter-server load balancing and intra-server scheduling. We have fully implemented Pallas and our extensive experiments across various synthetic workloads and real-world applications demonstrate that Pallas significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art solution RackSched by delivering stably low tail latency and high throughput, reducing tail latency by 8.5× at medium load and as much as two orders of magnitude at high load, while gracefully handling long-term workload shifts and short-term transient bursts.
papers.abstract_zh: 机架级CPU调度已成为满足微秒级服务日益增长的需求的一个有前景的方向。然而，先前的工作受到网络中不准确的负载平衡以及每个服务器内复杂但次优的调度的影响，这主要是由于其应用程序不可知论。本文介绍了 Pallas，这是一种应用感知的机架级 CPU 调度解决方案，适用于微秒级服务，具有接近最佳的性能。 Pallas 的核心是网络内工作负载整形，将工作负载划分为不同的分片，每个分片都保持 CPU 需求的高度同质性。通过调整后的工作负载，Pallas 会执行简单但接近最佳的服务器间负载平衡和服务器内调度。我们已经全面实施了 Pallas，我们在各种合成工作负载和实际应用程序中进行的广泛实验表明，Pallas 能够提供稳定的低尾部延迟和高吞吐量，显着优于最先进的解决方案 RackSched，在中等负载下将尾部延迟减少 8.5 倍，在高负载下减少两个数量级，同时优雅地处理长期工作负载转移和短期瞬态突发。

papers.title: Turbocharge ANNS on Real Processing-in-Memory by Enabling Fine-Grained Per-PIM-Core Scheduling.
papers.abstract: Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search (ANNS) plays a key role in database and AI infrastructure. It exhibits extremely high memory intensity with a ∼1:1 compute-to-memory access ratio. Commodity Processing-in-Memory (PIM) hardware such as UPMEM is promising for overcoming the memory wall in ANNS. However, its reuse of the system DDR bus prevents the CPU and PIM cores from accessing memory simultaneously. This necessitates batch scheduling in existing systems, which, in turn, leads to severe underutilization in two scenarios: 1) inter-batch, where PIM remains idle while the CPU is copying data, and 2) intra-batch, caused by uneven load distribution of PIM cores in a batch. This paper proposes an efficient PIM-capable ANNS system named PIMANN. We observe that each PIM core has an additional, undocumented, and little-known control interface (originally used for control commands like launching PIM kernels), which could be retrofitted for fine-grained arbitration of DDR bus access. Thus, PIMANN can break the traditional batching scheduling paradigm and adopt a fine-grained, per-PIM-core scheduling paradigm. With this key idea, PIMANN introduces 1) persistent PIM kernel technique to eliminate the idle state between two batches, and 2) per-PU query dispatching technique that dispatches queries based on the real-time load of PIM cores. Experiments show that PIMANN can boost throughput by 2.4-10.4× compared to existing ANNS systems on CPU or GPU. The implementation of PIMANN is available at https://github.com/cds-ruc/PIM-ANNS .
papers.abstract_zh: 近似最近邻搜索（ANNS）在数据库和人工智能基础设施中发挥着关键作用。它表现出极高的内存强度，计算与内存访问比率约为 1:1。 UPMEM 等商品内存处理 (PIM) 硬件有望克服 ANNS 中的内存墙。然而，它对系统 DDR 总线的重用阻止了 CPU 和 PIM 内核同时访问内存。这需要在现有系统中进行批量调度，而这又会导致两种情况下的严重利用率不足：1）批次间，当CPU复制数据时，PIM保持空闲；2）批次内，由于批次中PIM核心的负载分布不均匀而导致。本文提出了一种高效的具有 PIM 功能的 ANNS 系统，称为 PIMANN。我们观察到每个 PIM 内核都有一个额外的、未记录的且鲜为人知的控制接口（最初用于启动 PIM 内核等控制命令），可以对其进行改造以实现 DDR 总线访问的细粒度仲裁。因此，PIMANN可以打破传统的批处理调度范式，采用细粒度的、每PIM核心的调度范式。基于这一关键思想，PIMANN 引入了 1）持久 PIM 内核技术，以消除两个批次之间的空闲状态，以及 2）每 PU 查询调度技术，根据 PIM 内核的实时负载调度查询。实验表明，与 CPU 或 GPU 上的现有 ANNS 系统相比，PIMANN 可以将吞吐量提高 2.4-10.4 倍。 PIMANN 的实现可在 https://github.com/cds-ruc/PIM-ANNS 上找到。

papers.title: Understanding and Detecting Fail-Slow Hardware Failure Bugs in Cloud Systems.
papers.abstract: Fail-slow hardwares are still running and functional, but in a degraded mode, thus slower than their expected performance. Bugs triggered by fail-slow hardwares cause severe cloud system failures. Existing testing tools fail to efficiently detect these bugs due to overlooking their characteristics. In order to address this problem, this paper provides a bug study that analyzes 48 real-world fail-slow hardware failures from typical cloud systems. We observe that (1) fail-slow hardwares make high-level software components vulnerable, including synchronized and timeout mechanisms; (2) the fine granularity of fail-slow hardwares is necessary to trigger these bugs. Based on these two observations, we propose Sieve, a fault injection testing framework for detecting fail-slow hardware failure bugs. Sieve statically analyzes target system codes to identify synchronized and timeout-protected I/O operations as candidate fault points and instruments hooks before candidate fault points to enable fail slow hardware injection. To efficiently explore candidate fault points, Sieve adopts grouping and context-sensitive injection strategies. We have applied Sieve to three widely deployed cloud systems, i.e., ZooKeeper, Kafka, and HDFS. Sieve has detected six unknown bugs, two of which have been confirmed.
papers.abstract_zh: 故障慢速硬件仍在运行并正常工作，但处于降级模式，因此比预期性能慢。由慢速硬件触发的错误会导致严重的云系统故障。现有的测试工具由于忽视了这些缺陷的特征而无法有效地检测它们。为了解决这个问题，本文提供了一项错误研究，分析了来自典型云系统的 48 个现实世界的慢速硬件故障。我们观察到（1）故障缓慢的硬件使高级软件组件容易受到攻击，包括同步和超时机制； (2) 慢故障硬件的细粒度对于触发这些错误是必要的。基于这两个观察，我们提出了 Sieve，一种用于检测故障缓慢硬件故障错误的故障注入测试框架。 Sieve 静态分析目标系统代码，将同步和超时保护的 I/O 操作识别为候选故障点，并在候选故障点之前进行仪器挂钩，以实现故障缓慢硬件注入。为了有效地探索候选故障点，Sieve 采用分组和上下文相关的注入策略。我们已将 Sieve 应用到了三种广泛部署的云系统，即 ZooKeeper、Kafka 和 HDFS。 Sieve 已检测到六个未知错误，其中两个已得到确认。

papers.title: Universal Checkpointing: A Flexible and Efficient Distributed Checkpointing System for Large-Scale DNN Training with Reconfigurable Parallelism.
papers.abstract: Deep neural network (DNN) training continues to scale rapidly in terms of model size, data volume, and sequence length, to the point where multiple machines are required to fit large models for training. Different distributed and parallel training strategies have been developed to support large-scale DNN training by partitioning the training state across GPUs. However, existing DNN training systems provide very limited support for reconfiguring parallelism strategies in the middle of the training via checkpointing. This limitation arises because distributed checkpoints are tightly coupled to specific model parallelism and hardware configurations, preventing large-scale training jobs from efficiently adapting to hardware failures or resource elasticity. This paper presents Universal Checkpointing (UCP), a novel checkpointing system that enables flexible and efficient DNN training with reconfigurable parallelism. UCP overcomes challenges in existing systems by decoupling checkpoint structure from parallel training strategies and hardware configurations. In addition, we present a pattern-based reconfiguration pipeline that enables automatic, flexible, and efficient mapping of checkpoint state to various parallelism strategies. Evaluation on a range of DNN models, including state-of-the-art dense and sparse LLMs, shows that UCP enables reconfiguration for a broader set of widely used parallelism strategies than existing solutions while adding negligible reconfiguration cost. UCP has been successfully employed in real LLM training workloads, greatly enhancing their flexibility and resilience to dynamic hardware environments.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 训练在模型大小、数据量和序列长度方面持续快速扩展，以至于需要多台机器来适应大型模型进行训练。人们已经开发出不同的分布式并行训练策略，通过跨 GPU 划分训练状态来支持大规模 DNN 训练。然而，现有的 DNN 训练系统对于在训练过程中通过检查点重新配置并行策略提供的支持非常有限。出现这种限制的原因是分布式检查点与特定模型并行性和硬件配置紧密耦合，导致大规模训练作业无法有效适应硬件故障或资源弹性。本文提出了通用检查点 (UCP)，这是一种新颖的检查点系统，可通过可重新配置的并行性实现灵活高效的 DNN 训练。 UCP 通过将检查点结构与并行训练策略和硬件配置解耦来克服现有系统中的挑战。此外，我们提出了一种基于模式的重新配置管道，可以自动、灵活且高效地将检查点状态映射到各种并行策略。对一系列 DNN 模型（包括最先进的密集和稀疏 LLM）的评估表明，与现有解决方案相比，UCP 能够针对更广泛的广泛使用的并行策略进行重新配置，同时增加的重新配置成本可以忽略不计。 UCP 已成功应用于真实的 LLM 培训工作负载，极大地增强了其对动态硬件环境的灵活性和弹性。

papers.title: Unveiling Compiler Faults via Attribute-Guided Compilation Space Exploration.
papers.abstract: Compiler testing is critically important, as compilers serve as the foundational infrastructure in system software development. A comprehensive exploration of the compilation space is essential for uncovering bugs in compilers. Existing methods primarily involve the utilization of various compilation options alongside test programs as inputs for stress-testing compilers. However, these compilation options are typically applied uniformly across all program elements-such as functions and variables–by default, limiting the ability to thoroughly explore the compilation space. In programming languages like C and C++, attributes such as the __attribute__((always_inline)) directive provide a mechanism for programmers to specify additional information for specific code elements to the compiler. These attributes allow for precise control over the compilation process, such as enforcing constraints and customizing optimization passes for particular elements. This flexibility in specifying attributes offers opportunities to investigate previously unexamined areas within compilers. Unfortunately, few studies have leveraged attributes for compiler testing. To this end, we propose ATLAS, an attribute-guided approach that strategically inserts attributes into test programs to facilitate a more thorough exploration of the compilation space. Our key insight is that attributes specified for individual program elements can provide a more flexible means of exploring the compilation space. Our extensive experiments on GCC and LLVM demonstrate the superiority of ATLAS over baseline testing techniques that do not employ attributes, particularly in terms of bug detection and code coverage. Furthermore, ATLAS has led to the discovery of 73 unique bugs in GCC and LLVM, 58 of which have already been confirmed or fixed, showcasing its practical utility.
papers.abstract_zh: 编译器测试至关重要，因为编译器是系统软件开发的基础设施。全面探索编译空间对于发现编译器中的错误至关重要。现有方法主要涉及利用各种编译选项以及测试程序作为压力测试编译器的输入。然而，默认情况下，这些编译选项通常统一应用于所有程序元素（例如函数和变量），从而限制了彻底探索编译空间的能力。在 C 和 C++ 等编程语言中，诸如 __attribute__((always_inline)) 指令之类的属性为程序员提供了一种向编译器指定特定代码元素的附加信息的机制。这些属性允许对编译过程进行精确控制，例如强制约束和自定义特定元素的优化过程。这种指定属性的灵活性提供了研究编译器中以前未检查的领域的机会。不幸的是，很少有研究利用属性来进行编译器测试。为此，我们提出了 ATLAS，这是一种属性引导的方法，可以策略性地将属性插入到测试程序中，以促进对编译空间进行更彻底的探索。我们的主要见解是，为各个程序元素指定的属性可以提供更灵活的方式来探索编译空间。我们对 GCC 和 LLVM 进行的广泛实验证明了 ATLAS 相对于不使用属性的基线测试技术的优越性，特别是在错误检测和代码覆盖率方面。此外，ATLAS 在 GCC 和 LLVM 中发现了 73 个独特的错误，其中 58 个已被确认或修复，展示了其实用性。

papers.title: Voltrix: Sparse Matrix-Matrix Multiplication on Tensor Cores with Asynchronous and Balanced Kernel Optimization.
papers.abstract: Sparse Matrix-Matrix Multiplication (SpMM) is crucial in scientific computing and machine learning. Despite advancements in GPU architectures, efficiently leveraging Tensor Cores for SpMM remains challenging. The core issue is the mismatch between the inherently sparse nature of the matrices and the dense computational patterns. Existing methods struggle with substantial overheads in loading data to computation units and cannot adequately manage data imbalance across computations, thereby limiting the high computational throughput potential of Tensor Cores. In this paper, we introduce Voltrix-SpMM, a revolutionary GPU kernel design that overcomes these challenges. First, we implement an asynchronous data loading pipeline that employs a bit-wise compressed format for sparse matrices and bulk memory copy instructions for dense matrices. This innovative design enables efficient data access and incorporates a warp-specialized producer-consumer model to seamlessly overlap data loading with computation. Second, we develop a persistent and I/O co-balanced kernel mechanism that features a two-stage partition strategy to achieve balance between input and output. Implemented with CUDA 12.6, Voltrix-SpMM substantially improves performance, delivering an average speedups of 36.5x and 1.8x over Tensor Core-based TC-GNN and DTC-SpMM respectively, and an average 1.7x speedup over the CUDA Core-based RoDe, fully unleashing the power of Tensor Cores for SpMM.
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵-矩阵乘法 (SpMM) 在科学计算和机器学习中至关重要。尽管 GPU 架构取得了进步，但有效利用张量核心进行 SpMM 仍然具有挑战性。核心问题是矩阵固有的稀疏性质与密集的计算模式之间的不匹配。现有方法在将数据加载到计算单元时面临大量开销，并且无法充分管理计算之间的数据不平衡，从而限制了 Tensor Core 的高计算吞吐量潜力。在本文中，我们介绍了 Voltrix-SpMM，这是一种克服这些挑战的革命性 GPU 内核设计。首先，我们实现一个异步数据加载管道，该管道对稀疏矩阵采用按位压缩格式，对密集矩阵采用批量内存复制指令。这种创新设计实现了高效的数据访问，并结合了 Warp 专用的生产者-消费者模型，将数据加载与计算无缝重叠。其次，我们开发了持久性和 I/O 协同平衡的内核机制，该机制采用两阶段分区策略来实现输入和输出之间的平衡。 Voltrix-SpMM 采用 CUDA 12.6 实现，性能大幅提升，与基于 Tensor Core 的 TC-GNN 和 DTC-SpMM 平均加速分别为 36.5 倍和 1.8 倍，比基于 CUDA Core 的 RoDe 平均加速 1.7 倍，充分释放了 SpMM Tensor Core 的威力。

papers.title: Weaver: Efficient Multi-LLM Serving with Attention Offloading.
papers.abstract: LLM serving platforms typically provide services for tens to hundreds of different models, where a small number of hot models receive the majority of the requests, while most other models remain cold. Yet, current serving systems can not efficiently handle such workloads: Using dedicated instances for hot and cold models makes the GPU memory underutilized, and multiplexing different models with model parallelism introduces communication overhead. We propose a mechanism called workload weaving , which offloads attention operators of hot models to running cold models, achieving high GPU memory utilization with low communication cost. To mitigate the blocking caused by running cold models, we propose WEAVER with two key techniques: (i) GPU-driven dynamic control flow, which delegates the control logic of offloading to GPUs, letting the offloaded operators bypass pending kernels in the GPU hardware queue; (ii) operator splitting, which carefully divides the large kernels of cold models into smaller ones to mitigate the head-of-line blocking. Our evaluation using real-world LLM trace demonstrates that WEAVER improves the throughput of hot models by up to 77% while maintaining the same or lower TPOT. For the cold model, WEAVER incurs a modest overhead (3-5ms).
papers.abstract_zh: LLM服务平台通常为数十到数百个不同的模型提供服务，其中少数热模型接收大部分请求，而大多数其他模型仍然冷。然而，当前的服务系统无法有效地处理此类工作负载：对热模型和冷模型使用专用实例会导致 GPU 内存未得到充分利用，并且通过模型并行性复用不同模型会带来通信开销。我们提出了一种称为工作负载编织的机制，它将热模型的注意力算子转移到运行冷模型上，以较低的通信成本实现高 GPU 内存利用率。为了减轻运行冷模型造成的阻塞，我们提出了具有两项关键技术的WEAVER：（i）GPU驱动的动态控制流，它将卸载的控制逻辑委托给GPU，让卸载的算子绕过GPU硬件队列中的待处理内核； (ii) 算子分裂，仔细地将冷模型的大内核划分为较小的内核，以减轻队头阻塞。我们使用真实世界的 LLM 跟踪进行的评估表明，WEAVER 将热模型的吞吐量提高了高达 77%，同时保持相同或更低的 TPOT。对于冷模型，WEAVER 会产生适度的开销（3-5 毫秒）。

papers.title: WIC: Hiding Producer-Consumer Synchronization Delays with Warp-Level Interrupt-based GPU Communications.
papers.abstract: GPU communication plays a pivotal role in collaborative computation across multiple devices. Despite advancements in inter-device communication fabrics and architectures, synchronization still remains a significant challenge due to the manual coordination required between producers and consumers at the application level. In this work, we first reveal that traditional synchronization is a primary bottleneck in GPU communication, where consumers frequently poll for producer data availability. Specifically, early-started polling leads to the unnecessary occupation of computational resources. To address this issue, we propose Warp-level Interrupt-based Communication (WIC), a novel synchronization framework for GPU communication that introduces a fine-grained interruption mechanism at the warp level to replace repetitive polling. WIC preemptively stalls warps engaged in frequent polling and releases computational resources for other warps, thereby effectively overlapping producer-consumer synchronization with ongoing computations. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that WIC significantly outperforms conventional polling methods by 1.13 × on average across various applications with diverse communication patterns.
papers.abstract_zh: GPU 通信在跨多个设备的协作计算中发挥着关键作用。尽管设备间通信结构和架构取得了进步，但由于应用程序级别的生产者和消费者之间需要手动协调，同步仍然是一个重大挑战。在这项工作中，我们首先揭示了传统同步是 GPU 通信中的主要瓶颈，消费者经常轮询生产者数据可用性。具体来说，过早开始的轮询会导致不必要的计算资源占用。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Warp 级基于中断的通信（WIC），这是一种新颖的 GPU 通信同步框架，它在 Warp 级别引入了细粒度的中断机制来取代重复轮询。 WIC 抢先停止频繁轮询的 warp，并为其他 warp 释放计算资源，从而有效地将生产者-消费者同步与正在进行的计算重叠。综合实验表明，在具有不同通信模式的各种应用程序中，WIC 的性能平均显着优于传统轮询方法 1.13 倍。

papers.title: XRT: An Accelerator-Aware Runtime for Accelerated Chip Multiprocessors.
papers.abstract: Datacenter applications spend a considerable portion of compute resources executing common functions. This has led to the deployment of accelerators capable of executing these functions with higher performance and energy efficiency. At the same time, datacenter applications require microsecond-scale response times and low tail latency. To meet these strict requirements, recent Chip Multi-Processors (CMPs) incorporate several on-chip accelerators. This enables fast communication between the general-purpose cores, direct accelerator access to the on-chip memory subsystem, and scalable sharing of accelerator resources across applications running on many general-purpose cores. Despite hardware support for on-chip accelerators, a lack of support at the runtime level prevents their efficient use at scale. Our key insight in this work is that current runtimes are unsuitable for applications that make heavy use of on-chip accelerators, yielding suboptimal throughput–sometimes even worse than a system without accelerators. To address this problem, we develop XRT, a runtime for accelerated CMPs designed to scale to many-core, many-accelerator CPUs. Across a set of representative services, XRT achieves up to 3.2× higher throughput-under-SLO compared to an unoptimized runtime and never experiences slowdowns compared to a system that executes all request processing on general-purpose cores.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据中心应用程序花费相当一部分计算资源来执行常见功能。这导致了能够以更高的性能和能源效率执行这些功能的加速器的部署。同时，数据中心应用程序需要微秒级响应时间和低尾部延迟。为了满足这些严格的要求，最新的片上多处理器 (CMP) 集成了多个片上加速器。这样可以实现通用内核之间的快速通信、对片上内存子系统的直接加速器访问以及在许多通用内核上运行的应用程序之间可扩展地共享加速器资源。尽管硬件支持片上加速器，但缺乏运行时级别的支持阻碍了它们的大规模有效使用。我们在这项工作中的主要见解是，当前的运行时不适合大量使用片上加速器的应用程序，从而产生次优的吞吐量——有时甚至比没有加速器的系统更糟糕。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了 XRT，这是一种加速 CMP 的运行时，旨在扩展到多核、多加速器 CPU。在一组代表性服务中，与未优化的运行时相比，XRT 在 SLO 下的吞吐量提高了 3.2 倍，并且与在通用内核上执行所有请求处理的系统相比，从未出现过速度下降的情况。

papers.title: Z-LFS: A Zoned Namespace-tailored Log-structured File System for Commodity Small-zone ZNS SSDs.
papers.abstract: This paper presents a novel zoned namespace (ZNS) tailored log-structured file system (LFS) called Z-LFS for commodity small-zone ZNS SSDs. Specifically, Z-LFS first enables append-only updates on metadata while leveraging the unique metadata characteristic of LFS on ZNS SSDs. Second, Z-LFS devises speculative log stream management according to the workload temperature to maximize active zone utilization. Finally, Z-LFS adopts conflict-aware zone allocation to minimize resource contention within ZNS SSDs while considering LFS features. We implement Z-LFS based on F2FS in the Linux kernel and evaluate it with commodity ZNS SSD. Our evaluations show that Z-LFS achieves higher performance by up to 33.44× and 3.5× compared with F2FS and a state-of-the-art interface for commodity ZNS SSDs, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的分区命名空间 (ZNS) 定制日志结构文件系统 (LFS)，称为 Z-LFS，适用于商用小区域 ZNS SSD。具体来说，Z-LFS 首先启用元数据的仅追加更新，同时利用 ZNS SSD 上 LFS 的独特元数据特征。其次，Z-LFS 根据工作负载温度设计推测日志流管理，以最大限度地提高活动区域利用率。最后，Z-LFS 采用冲突感知区域分配，在考虑 LFS 功能的同时最大限度地减少 ZNS SSD 内的资源争用。我们在 Linux 内核中基于 F2FS 实现了 Z-LFS，并使用商用 ZNS SSD 对其进行了评估。我们的评估表明，与 F2FS 和商用 ZNS SSD 的最先进接口相比，Z-LFS 的性能分别提高了 33.44 倍和 3.5 倍。

papers.title: μEFI: A Microkernel-Style UEFI with Isolation and Transparency.
papers.abstract: The Unified Extensible Firmware Interface (UEFI) has established itself as the leading firmware standard in modern devices, offering enhanced extensibility, user-friendly graphical interface, and improved security capabilities. At the core of UEFI security is UEFI Secure Boot, designed to ensure that only trusted drivers and applications are loaded during system startup. However, the growing number of UEFI-related CVEs and the emergence of attacks that bypass UEFI Secure Boot have highlighted its limitations, exposing vulnerabilities that could be exploited by attackers. We propose μEFI, the first isolation framework for UEFI firmware that can transparently run UEFI modules in sandboxes. Drawing inspiration from microkernel design, we deprivilege UEFI modules to user mode and isolate them in different address spaces (sandboxes). To enable the transparent execution of UEFI modules, we propose trampoline injection and protocol analysis. To further strengthen UEFI security, we incorporate a seccomp-like mechanism to restrict module capabilities and perform automated input validation to detect and prevent invalid inputs. Evaluation results demonstrate that our system can run complex UEFI modules without modifications, which incurs a small overhead of 1.91% for UEFI boot phase.
papers.abstract_zh: 统一可扩展固件接口 (UEFI) 已成为现代设备中领先的固件标准，提供增强的可扩展性、用户友好的图形界面和改进的安全功能。 UEFI 安全性的核心是 UEFI 安全启动，旨在确保在系统启动期间仅加载受信任的驱动程序和应用程序。然而，UEFI 相关 CVE 数量的不断增加以及绕过 UEFI 安全启动的攻击的出现凸显了其局限性，暴露了可能被攻击者利用的漏洞。我们提出了μEFI，这是第一个 UEFI 固件隔离框架，可以在沙箱中透明地运行 UEFI 模块。从微内核设计中汲取灵感，我们剥夺了 UEFI 模块的用户模式权限，并将它们隔离在不同的地址空间（沙箱）中。为了实现 UEFI 模块的透明执行，我们提出了蹦床注入和协议分析。为了进一步增强 UEFI 安全性，我们采用了类似 seccomp 的机制来限制模块功能并执行自动输入验证以检测和防止无效输入。评估结果表明，我们的系统无需修改即可运行复杂的 UEFI 模块，这在 UEFI 启动阶段产生了 1.91% 的小开销。

papers.title: A Difference World: High-performance, NVM-invariant, Software-only Intermittent Computation.
papers.abstract: Supporting long life, high performance, intermittent computation is an essential challenge in allowing energy harvesting devices to fulfill the vision of smart dust. Intermittent computation is the extension of long-running computation across the frequent, unexpected, power cycles that result from replacing batteries with harvested energy. The most promising intermittent computation support strategies combine programmer direction and compiler analysis to minimize run-time overhead and provide programmer control—without specialized hardware support. While such strategies succeed in reducing the size of non-volatile memory writes due to checkpointing, they must checkpoint continuously. Unfortunately, for Flash-based devices (by far the most ubiquitous), writing checkpoints is slow and gradually kills the device. Without intervention, Flash devices and software-only intermittent computation are fundamentally incompatible. To enable ubiquitous programmer-guided intermittent computation we design and implement Camel. The key idea behind Camel is the systematic bifurcation of program state into two "worlds'' of differing volatility. Programmers compose intermittent programs by stitching together atomic units of computation called tasks. The Camel compiler ensures that all within-task data is placed in the volatile world and all between-task data is placed in the non-volatile world. Between tasks, Camel swaps the worlds, atomically locking-in the forward progress of the preceding task. In preparation for the next task, Camel resolves differences in world view by copying only differences due to the preceding task's updates. This systematic decomposition into a mixed-volatility memory allows—for the first time—long-life and high performance programmer-guided intermittent computation on Flash devices: Camel outperforms the state-of-the-art checkpointing system for Flash-based devices by up to 5x while eliminating the need for hardware support. Beyond Flash, Camel's differential buffer system improves performance by a factor of 2x compared to existing task-based approaches on FRAM platforms.
papers.abstract_zh: 支持长寿命、高性能、间歇性计算是能量收集设备实现智能灰尘愿景的一项重要挑战。间歇计算是长时间运行计算在频繁、意外的电源循环中的延伸，这些电源循环是由于用收集的能量更换电池而产生的。最有前途的间歇性计算支持策略将程序员指导和编译器分析结合起来，以最大限度地减少运行时开销并提供程序员控制，而无需专门的硬件支持。虽然此类策略通过检查点成功地减少了非易失性存储器写入的大小，但它们必须连续进行检查点。不幸的是，对于基于闪存的设备（迄今为止最普遍的），写入检查点的速度很慢，并且会逐渐杀死设备。如果没有干预，闪存设备和纯软件间歇性计算从根本上是不兼容的。为了实现无处不在的程序员引导的间歇性计算，我们设计并实现了 Camel。 Camel 背后的关键思想是将程序状态系统地分为两个具有不同波动性的“世界”。程序员通过将称为任务的原子计算单元拼接在一起来编写间歇性程序。Camel 编译器确保所有任务内数据都放置在易失性世界中，所有任务间数据都放置在非易失性世界中。在任务之间，Camel 交换世界，原子地锁定前一个任务的前进进度。在为下一个任务做准备时，Camel 通过以下方式解决世界观的差异：这种对混合易失性存储器的系统分解首次允许在闪存设备上实现长寿命和高性能的由程序员引导的间歇性计算：Camel 的性能比基于闪存的设备的最先进的检查点系统高出 5 倍，同时消除了对硬件支持的需求。与 FRAM 平台上现有的基于任务的方法相比，Camel 的差分缓冲系统将性能提高了 2 倍。

papers.title: A Secure, Fast, and Resource-Efficient Serverless Platform with Function REWIND.
papers.abstract: Serverless computing often utilizes the warm container technique to improve response times. However, this method, which allows the reuse of function containers across different function requests of the same type, creates persistent vulnerabilities in memory and file systems. These vulnerabilities can lead to security breaches such as data leaks. Traditional approaches to address these issues often suffer from performance drawbacks and high memory requirements due to extensive use of user-level snapshots and complex restoration processes. The paper introduces REWIND, an innovative and efficient serverless function execution platform designed to address these security and efficiency concerns. REWIND ensures that after each function request, the container is reset to an initial state, free from any sensitive data, including a thorough restoration of the file system to prevent data leakage. It incorporates a kernel-level memory snapshot management system, which significantly lowers memory usage and accelerates the rewind process. Additionally, REWIND optimizes runtime by reusing memory regions and leveraging the temporal locality of function executions, enhancing performance while maintaining strict data isolation between requests. The REWIND prototype is implemented on OpenWhisk and Linux and evaluated with serverless benchmark workloads. The evaluation results have demonstrated that REWIND provides substantial memory saving while providing high function execution performance. Especially, the low memory usage makes more warm containers kept alive thereby improving the throughput as well as the latency of function execution while providing isolation between function requests.
papers.abstract_zh: 无服务器计算通常利用热容器技术来缩短响应时间。然而，这种允许在同一类型的不同功能请求之间重用功能容器的方法会在内存和文件系统中产生持久的漏洞。这些漏洞可能会导致数据泄露等安全漏洞。由于广泛使用用户级快照和复杂的恢复过程，解决这些问题的传统方法通常会遇到性能缺陷和高内存需求。本文介绍了 REWIND，这是一种创新且高效的无服务器功能执行平台，旨在解决这些安全和效率问题。 REWIND 确保在每次功能请求后，容器重置为初始状态，不含任何敏感数据，包括彻底恢复文件系统以防止数据泄漏。它采用了内核级内存快照管理系统，可显着降低内存使用量并加速回滚过程。此外，REWIND 通过重用内存区域和利用函数执行的时间局部性来优化运行时，提高性能，同时保持请求之间严格的数据隔离。 REWIND 原型在 OpenWhisk 和 Linux 上实现，并使用无服务器基准工作负载进行评估。评估结果表明，REWIND 可节省大量内存，同时提供较高的函数执行性能。特别是，低内存使用率使更多的热容器保持活动状态，从而提高吞吐量以及函数执行的延迟，同时提供函数请求之间的隔离。

papers.title: Accelerating the Training of Large Language Models using Efficient Activation Rematerialization and Optimal Hybrid Parallelism.
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in training large-scale models have centered on optimizing activation strategies and exploring various parallel training options. One research avenue focuses on enhancing activation-related operations, such as offloading and recomputing. However, there is room for further refinement in these strategies to improve the balance between computation and memory utilization. Another line of work explores different training parallelisms, which often require extensive parameter tuning and achieve suboptimal combinations of parallel options. To tackle these challenges, this paper introduces a novel method for losslessly accelerating the training of large language models. Specifically, two efficient activation rematerialization strategies are proposed: Pipeline-Parallel-Aware Offloading, which maximizes the utilization of host memory for storing activations, and Compute-Memory Balanced Checkpointing, which seeks a practical equilibrium between activation memory and computational efficiency. Additionally, the paper presents an extremely efficient searching method for optimizing parameters for hybrid parallelism, considering both offloading and checkpointing to achieve optimal performance. The efficacy of the proposed method is demonstrated through extensive experiments on public benchmarks with diverse model sizes and context window sizes. For example, the method significantly increases Model FLOPs Utilization (MFU) from 32.3% to 42.7% for a 175B Llama-like model with a context window size of 32,768 on 256 NVIDIA H800.
papers.abstract_zh: 训练大型模型的最新进展集中在优化激活策略和探索各种并行训练选项上。一种研究途径侧重于增强与激活相关的操作，例如卸载和重新计算。然而，这些策略还有进一步细化的空间，以改善计算和内存利用率之间的平衡。另一项工作探索不同的训练并行性，这通常需要大量的参数调整并实现并行选项的次优组合。为了应对这些挑战，本文提出了一种无损加速大型语言模型训练的新方法。具体来说，提出了两种有效的激活重新实现策略：管道并行感知卸载（Pipeline-Parallel-Aware Offloading）和计算内存平衡检查点（Compute-Memory Balanced Checkpointing），前者最大限度地利用主机内存来存储激活，后者寻求激活内存和计算效率之间的实际平衡。此外，本文提出了一种极其有效的搜索方法，用于优化混合并行性的参数，同时考虑卸载和检查点以实现最佳性能。通过对具有不同模型大小和上下文窗口大小的公共基准的广泛实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。例如，对于 256 NVIDIA H800 上上下文窗口大小为 32,768 的 175B Llama 类模型，该方法将模型 FLOP 利用率 (MFU) 从 32.3% 显着提高到 42.7%。

papers.title: ALPS: An Adaptive Learning, Priority OS Scheduler for Serverless Functions.
papers.abstract: FaaS (Function-as-a-Service) workloads feature unique patterns. Serverless functions are ephemeral, highly concurrent, and bursty, with an execution duration ranging from a few milliseconds to a few seconds. The workload behaviors pose new challenges to kernel scheduling. Linux CFS (Completely Fair Scheduler) is workload-oblivious and optimizes long-term fairness via proportional sharing. CFS neglects the short-term demands of CPU time from short-lived serverless functions, severely impacting the performance of short functions. Preemptive shortest job first—shortest remaining process time (SRPT)—prioritizes shorter functions in order to satisfy their short-term demands of CPU time and, therefore, serves as a best-case baseline for optimizing the turnaround time of short functions. A significant downside of approximating SRPT, however, is that longer functions might be starved. In this paper, we propose a novel application-aware kernel scheduler, ALPS (Adaptive Learning, Priority Scheduler), based on two key insights. First, approximating SRPT can largely benefit short functions but may inevitably penalize long functions. Second, CFS provides necessary infrastructure support to implement user-defined priority scheduling. To this end, we design ALPS to have a novel, decoupled scheduler frontend and backend architecture, which unifies approximate SRPT and proportional-share scheduling. ALPS’ frontend sits in the user space and approximates SRPT-inspired priority scheduling by adaptively learning from an SRPT simulation on a recent past workload. ALPS’ backend uses eBPF functions hooked to CFS to carry out the continuously learned policies sent from the frontend to inform scheduling decisions in the kernel. This design adds workload intelligence to workload-oblivious OS scheduling while retaining the desirable properties of OS schedulers. We evaluate ALPS extensively using two production FaaS workloads (Huawei and Azure), and results show that ALPS achieves a reduction of 57.2% in average function execution duration compared to CFS.
papers.abstract_zh: FaaS（功能即服务）工作负载具有独特的模式。无服务器函数具有短暂性、高并发性和突发性，执行时间从几毫秒到几秒不等。工作负载行为给内核调度带来了新的挑战。 Linux CFS（完全公平调度程序）不考虑工作负载，并通过比例共享来优化长期公平性。 CFS 忽略了短期无服务器功能对 CPU 时间的短期需求，严重影响了短期功能的性能。抢占式最短作业优先——最短剩余处理时间 (SRPT)——优先考虑较短的函数，以满足其对 CPU 时间的短期需求，因此，可以作为优化短函数周转时间的最佳情况基准。然而，近似 SRPT 的一个显着缺点是较长的函数可能会缺乏。在本文中，我们基于两个关键见解提出了一种新颖的应用程序感知内核调度程序 ALPS（自适应学习，优先级调度程序）。首先，近似 SRPT 在很大程度上有利于短函数，但可能不可避免地损害长函数。其次，CFS为实现用户自定义优先级调度提供了必要的基础设施支持。为此，我们将 ALPS 设计为具有新颖的、解耦的调度器前端和后端架构，它统一了近似 SRPT 和比例份额调度。 ALPS 的前端位于用户空间，通过自适应地学习最近工作负载的 SRPT 模拟来近似 SRPT 启发的优先级调度。 ALPS 的后端使用连接到 CFS 的 eBPF 函数来执行从前端发送的持续学习策略，以通知内核中的调度决策。此设计将工作负载智能添加到无工作负载的操作系统调度中，同时保留操作系统调度程序的所需属性。我们使用两种生产 FaaS 工作负载（华为和 Azure）对 ALPS 进行了广泛评估，结果表明，与 CFS 相比，ALPS 的平均函数执行持续时间减少了 57.2%。

papers.title: An Empirical Study of Rust-for-Linux: The Success, Dissatisfaction, and Compromise.
papers.abstract: Developed for over 30 years, Linux has already become the computing foundation for today's digital world; from gigantic, complex mainframes (e.g., supercomputers) to cheap, wimpy embedded devices (e.g., IoTs), countless applications are built on top of it. Yet, such an infrastructure has been plagued by numerous memory and concurrency bugs since the day it was born, due to many rogue memory operations are permitted by C language. A recent project Rust-for-Linux (RFL) has the potential to address Linux's safety concerns once and for all -- by embracing Rust's static ownership and type checkers into the kernel code, the kernel may finally be free from memory and concurrency bugs without hurting its performance. While it has been gradually matured and even merged into Linux mainline, however, RFL is rarely studied and still remains unclear whether it has indeed reconciled the safety and performance dilemma for the kernel. To this end, we conduct the first empirical study on RFL to understand its status quo and benefits, especially on how Rust fuses with Linux and whether the fusion assures driver safety without overhead. We collect and analyze 6 key RFL drivers, which involve hundreds of issues and PRs, thousands of Github commits and mail exchanges of the Linux mailing list, as well as over 12K discussions on Zulip.We have found while Rust mitigates kernel vulnerabilities, it is beyond Rust's capability to fully eliminate them; what is more, if not handled properly, its safety assurance even costs the developers dearly in terms of both runtime overhead and development efforts.
papers.abstract_zh: 经过30多年的发展，Linux已经成为当今数字世界的计算基础；从巨大、复杂的大型机（例如超级计算机）到廉价、弱小的嵌入式设备（例如物联网），无数的应用程序都构建在其之上。然而，这样的基础设施自诞生之日起就受到大量内存和并发错误的困扰，因为 C 语言允许许多恶意内存操作。最近的一个项目 Rust-for-Linux (RFL) 有可能一劳永逸地解决 Linux 的安全问题——通过将 Rust 的静态所有权和类型检查器纳入内核代码中，内核最终可能会摆脱内存和并发错误，而不会损害其性能。尽管RFL已经逐渐成熟，甚至并入Linux主线，但人们对RFL的研究却很少，并且仍然不清楚它是否确实解决了内核的安全和性能困境。为此，我们对 RFL 进行了首次实证研究，以了解其现状和优势，特别是 Rust 如何与 Linux 融合以及融合是否能够在没有开销的情况下确保驱动程序安全。我们收集并分析了 6 个关键的 RFL 驱动程序，其中涉及数百个问题和 PR、Linux 邮件列表的数千个 Github 提交和邮件交换，以及 Zulip 上超过 12K 的讨论。我们发现，虽然 Rust 缓解了内核漏洞，但完全消除它们超出了 Rust 的能力；更重要的是，如果处理不当，其安全保证甚至会让开发人员在运行时开销和开发工作方面付出高昂的代价。

papers.title: Balancing Analysis Time and Bug Detection: Daily Development-friendly Bug Detection in Linux.
papers.abstract: Linux, a battle-tested codebase, is known to suffer from many bugs despite its extensive testing mechanisms. While many of these bugs require domain-specific knowledge for detection, a significant portion matches well-known bug patterns. Even though these bugs can be found with existing tools, our simple check of Linux kernel patches suggests that these tools are not used much in the developer's daily workflow. The lack of usage is probably due to the well-known trade-off between analysis time and bug detection capabilities: tools typically employ complex analysis to effectively and comprehensively find bugs in return for a long analysis time, or focus on a short analysis time by only employing elementary analyses and thus can only find a very limited number of bugs. Ideally, developers expect the tools to incur short analysis time, while still finding many bugs to use them in daily development. This paper explores an approach that balances this trade-off by focusing on bugs that can be found with less computationally-complex analysis methods, and limiting the scope to each source code. To achieve this, we propose a combination of computationally lightweight analyses and demonstrate our claim by designing FiTx, a framework for generating daily development-friendly bug checkers that focus on well-known patterns. Despite its simplicity, FiTx successfully identified 47 new bugs in the Linux kernel version 5.15 within 2.5 hours, outperforming Clang Static Analyzer and CppCheck in both speed and bug detection. It demonstrates that focusing on less complex bug patterns can still significantly contribute to the improvement of codebase health. FiTx can be embedded into the daily development routine, enabling early bug detection without sacrificing developers' time.
papers.abstract_zh: Linux 是一个久经考验的代码库，尽管拥有广泛的测试机制，但仍存在许多错误。虽然其中许多错误需要特定领域的知识才能检测，但其中很大一部分与众所周知的错误模式相匹配。尽管可以使用现有工具发现这些错误，但我们对 Linux 内核补丁的简单检查表明，这些工具在开发人员的日常工作流程中使用不多。缺乏使用可能是由于众所周知的分析时间和错误检测能力之间的权衡：工具通常采用复杂的分析来有效、全面地发现错误，但分析时间较长，或者仅采用基本分析来专注于较短的分析时间，因此只能发现非常有限的错误数量。理想情况下，开发人员希望这些工具能够缩短分析时间，同时在日常开发中使用它们时仍能发现许多错误。本文探讨了一种平衡这种权衡的方法，重点关注可以通过计算复杂性较低的分析方法发现的错误，并限制每个源代码的范围。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了轻量级计算分析的组合，并通过设计 FiTx 来证明我们的主张，FiTx 是一个用于生成专注于众所周知模式的日常开发友好的错误检查器的框架。尽管很简单，FiTx 在 2.5 小时内成功识别了 Linux 内核版本 5.15 中的 47 个新错误，在速度和错误检测方面均优于 Clang Static Analyzer 和 CppCheck。它表明，专注于不太复杂的错误模式仍然可以为代码库健康状况的改善做出重大贡献。 FiTx 可以嵌入到日常开发例程中，从而在不牺牲开发人员时间的情况下实现早期错误检测。

papers.title: Centimani: Enabling Fast AI Accelerator Selection for DNN Training with a Novel Performance Predictor.
papers.abstract: For an extended period, graphics processing units (GPUs) have stood as the exclusive choice for training deep neural network (DNN) models. Over time, to serve the growing demands in a more targeted manner, various artificial intelligence-specific hardware, referred to as AI accelerators , have been vigorously developed, aiming to provide more efficient DNN acceleration solutions. However, sufficient solutions are also heterogeneous and thus introduce complexities in accelerator selection. Given a DNN model and a training objective, such as throughput or price-performance ratio, it remains challenging to arrive at the optimal decision among many options due to high reimplementation costs and unexpected performance. To tackle this challenge, we propose Centimani , a performance predictor that accurately and rapidly predicts DNN training throughput on various AI accelerators, thereby facilitating the accelerator selection process. To achieve this goal, we first analyze typical AI accelerators and draw observations that abstract AI accelerator designs and guide our performance modeling approach. In particular, we construct a memory estimation model and decoupled performance models to select the most appropriate batch size and predict the execution time of DNN training. We validate our approach by applying Centimani to six common DNN models on four typical AI accelerators. Results show that Centimani predicts the throughput with an average accuracy of 93.1% on single-device training and 90.4% on multiple-device training, thus the optimal accelerator corresponding to the user's training objective can be obtained.
papers.abstract_zh: 长期以来，图形处理单元 (GPU) 一直是训练深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型的唯一选择。随着时间的推移，为了更有针对性地满足不断增长的需求，各种人工智能专用硬件（简称AI加速器）被大力开发，旨在提供更高效的DNN加速解决方案。然而，足够的解决方案也是异构的，因此增加了加速器选择的复杂性。给定 DNN 模型和训练目标（例如吞吐量或性价比），由于较高的重新实现成本和意外的性能，在众多选项中做出最佳决策仍然具有挑战性。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 Centimani，这是一种性能预测器，可以准确快速地预测各种 AI 加速器上的 DNN 训练吞吐量，从而促进加速器选择过程。为了实现这一目标，我们首先分析典型的人工智能加速器，并得出抽象人工智能加速器设计的观察结果并指导我们的性能建模方法。特别是，我们构建了内存估计模型和解耦性能模型来选择最合适的批量大小并预测 DNN 训练的执行时间。我们通过将 Centimani 应用于四个典型 AI 加速器上的六个常见 DNN 模型来验证我们的方法。结果表明，Centimani在单设备训练上预测吞吐量的平均准确率为93.1%，在多设备训练上预测吞吐量的平均准确率为90.4%，从而可以获得与用户训练目标相对应的最优加速器。

papers.title: Config-Snob: Tuning for the Best Configurations of Networking Protocol Stack.
papers.abstract: Web servers usually use predefined configurations, yet empirical studies have shown that performance can be significantly improved when the configurations of the networking protocol stack (e.g., TCP, QUIC, and congestion control parameters) are carefully tuned due to the fact that a “one-size-fits-all” strategy does not exist. However, dynamically tuning the protocol stack's configurations is challenging: first, the configuration space is ample, and parameters with complex dependencies must be tuned jointly; second, the network condition space is also large, so an adaptive solution is needed to handle clients' diversity and network dynamics; and finally, clients endure unsatisfactory performance degradation due to learning exploration. To this end, we propose Config-Snob, a protocol tuning solution that selects the best configurations based on historical data. Config-Snob exploits the configuration space by tuning several configuration knobs and provides a practical fine-grained client grouping while handling the network environment dynamics. Config-Snob uses a controlled exploration approach to minimize the performance degradation. Config-Snob utilizes causal inference (CI) algorithms to boost the tuning optimization. Config-Snob is implemented in a QUIC-based server and deployed in a large-scale production environment. Our extensive experiments show that the proposed solution improves the completion time over the default configurations by 15% to 36% (mean) and 62% to 70% (median) in the real deployment.
papers.abstract_zh: Web服务器通常使用预定义的配置，但实证研究表明，由于不存在“一刀切”的策略，因此当仔细调整网络协议栈的配置（例如TCP、QUIC和拥塞控制参数）时，性能可以显着提高。然而，动态调整协议栈的配置具有挑战性：首先，配置空间充足，依赖关系复杂的参数必须联合调整；其次，网络条件空间也很大，因此需要自适应解决方案来处理客户端的多样性和网络动态；最后，客户因学习探索而遭受令人不满意的性能下降。为此，我们提出了 Config-Snob，一种基于历史数据选择最佳配置的协议调优解决方案。 Config-Snob 通过调整多个配置旋钮来利用配置空间，并在处理网络环境动态的同时提供实用的细粒度客户端分组。 Config-Snob 使用受控探索方法来最大限度地减少性能下降。 Config-Snob 利用因果推理 (CI) 算法来促进调优优化。 Config-Snob在基于QUIC的服务器中实现，并部署在大规模生产环境中。我们的大量实验表明，在实际部署中，所提出的解决方案比默认配置的完成时间提高了 15% 至 36%（平均值）和 62% 至 70%（中值）。

papers.title: Conspirator: SmartNIC-Aided Control Plane for Distributed ML Workloads.
Cost-Efficient Large Language Model Serving for Multi-turn Conversations with CachedAttention.
papers.abstract: Interacting with humans through multi-turn conversations is a fundamental feature of large language models (LLMs). However, existing LLM serving engines executing multi-turn conversations are inefficient due to the need to repeatedly compute the key-value (KV) caches of historical tokens, incurring high serving costs. To address the problem, this paper proposes CachedAttention, a new attention mechanism that enables reuse of KV caches across multi-turn conversations, significantly reducing the repetitive computation overheads. CachedAttention maintains a hierarchical KV caching system that leverages cost-effective memory/storage mediums to save KV caches for all requests. To reduce KV cache access overheads from slow mediums, CachedAttention employs layer-wise pre-loading and asynchronous saving schemes to overlap the KV cache access with the GPU computation. To ensure that the KV caches to be accessed are placed in the fastest hierarchy, CachedAttention employs scheduler-aware fetching and eviction schemes to consciously place the KV caches in different layers based on the hints from the inference job scheduler. To avoid the invalidation of the saved KV caches incurred by context window overflow, CachedAttention enables the saved KV caches to remain valid via decoupling the positional encoding and effectively truncating the KV caches. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that CachedAttention significantly decreases the time to the first token (TTFT) by up to 87%, improves the prompt prefilling throughput by up to 7.8× for multi-turn conversations, and reduces the end-to-end inference cost by up to 70%.
papers.abstract_zh: 通过多轮对话与人类交互是大型语言模型（LLM）的基本特征。然而，现有执行多轮会话的LLM服务引擎​​由于需要重复计算历史令牌的键值（KV）缓存而效率低下，从而产生高昂的服务成本。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了 CachedAttention，这是一种新的注意力机制，可以在多轮对话中重用 KV 缓存，从而显着减少重复计算开销。 CachedAttention 维护一个分层的 KV 缓存系统，利用经济高效的内存/存储介质来保存所有请求的 KV 缓存。为了减少慢速介质的 KV 缓存访问开销，CachedAttention 采用分层预加载和异步保存方案，将 KV 缓存访问与 GPU 计算重叠。为了确保要访问的 KV 缓存放置在最快的层次结构中，CachedAttention 采用调度程序感知的获取和驱逐方案，根据推理作业调度程序的提示有意识地将 KV 缓存放置在不同的层中。为了避免由于上下文窗口溢出而导致保存的 KV 缓存失效，CachedAttention 通过解耦位置编码并有效截断 KV 缓存，使保存的 KV 缓存保持有效。大量实验结果表明，CachedAttention 可将第一个令牌的时间 (TTFT) 显着缩短高达 87%，将多轮对话的提示预填充吞吐量提高高达 7.8 倍，并将端到端推理成本降低高达 70%。

papers.title: CPC: Flexible, Secure, and Efficient CVM Maintenance with Confidential Procedure Calls.
papers.abstract: Confidential virtual machines (CVMs), while providing strong data privacy for cloud tenants, pose significant challenges to VM maintenance like live migration and snapshotting. Traditional host-based maintenance, while applicable to conventional VMs, is infeasible for CVMs due to the lack of trust in the host and the prevention of mandated intrusive access from the host. State-of-the-art approaches depend on non-trivial modifications to hardware and firmware and thus lead to notable compromises in security and/or performance. Furthermore, such approaches lack flexibility for upgrades and cross-platform compatibility, hindering the popularity of CVMs on the cloud. In this paper, we introduce Confidential Procedure Calls (CPCs), a flexible approach to the efficient and secure execution of CVM maintenance modules from within the guest. We have implemented prototypes on two leading CVM platforms. Our prototype on AMD SEV showcases the high performance of CPCs, with 3× (resource reclamation) or even 138× (live migration) faster than existing approaches. Our prototype on ARM CCA further confirms CPCs' outstanding security and flexibility.
papers.abstract_zh: 机密虚拟机 (CVM) 在为云租户提供强大的数据隐私的同时，也给实时迁移和快照等虚拟机维护带来了巨大挑战。传统的基于主机的维护虽然适用于传统虚拟机，但由于缺乏对主机的信任以及防止来自主机的强制侵入访问，因此对于 CVM 来说是不可行的。最先进的方法依赖于对硬件和固件的重大修改，因此导致安全性和/或性能方面的显着妥协。此外，此类方式缺乏升级灵活性和跨平台兼容性，阻碍了云服务器的普及。在本文中，我们介绍了机密过程调用 (CPC)，这是一种从来宾内部高效、安全地执行 CVM 维护模块的灵活方法。我们已经在两个领先的 CVM 平台上实现了原型。我们在 AMD SEV 上的原型展示了 CPC 的高性能，其速度比现有方法快 3 倍（资源回收）甚至 138 倍（实时迁移）。我们在 ARM CCA 上的原型进一步证实了 CPC 出色的安全性和灵活性。

papers.title: CrossMapping: Harmonizing Memory Consistency in Cross-ISA Binary Translation.
papers.abstract: The increasing prevalence of new Instruction Set Architectures (ISAs) necessitates the migration of closed-source binary programs across ISAs. Dynamic Binary Translation (DBT) stands out as a crucial technology for the cross-ISA emulation of binary programs. However, due to the mismatch in memory consistency between guest ISA and host ISA, DBT systems face substantial challenges in guaranteeing correctness and translation performance for concurrent programs. Despite several attempts to bridge the memory inconsistency between guest and host ISA, prior work is either not universal for cross-ISA DBT systems or inefficient and even error-prone in translation. This work presents CrossMapping, a general primitive mapping framework to enhance existing DBT systems for cross-ISA translation. By harmonizing memory consistency across diverse ISAs, CrossMapping enables smooth cross-ISA translation and accomplishes correct emulation. CrossMapping introduces specification tables to describe memory models in a unified and precise format, which facilitates the derivation of concurrent primitive mapping schemes based on a convenient comparison and analysis of memory models. The correctness of cross-ISA emulation is guaranteed by harmoniously integrating the derived mapping schemes with existing DBT systems. We evaluate CrossMapping for x86, ARMv8, and RISC-V on top of QEMU using the PARSEC benchmark suite. The results show that the average performance improvement can reach 8.5% when emulating x86 on ARMv8 and 7.3% when emulating x86 on RISC-V.
papers.abstract_zh: 新指令集架构 (ISA) 的日益普及使得闭源二进制程序必须跨 ISA 迁移。动态二进制翻译 (DBT) 是二进制程序跨 ISA 仿真的关键技术。然而，由于guest ISA和host ISA之间的内存一致性不匹配，DBT系统在保证并发程序的正确性和翻译性能方面面临着巨大的挑战。尽管多次尝试弥合来宾和主机 ISA 之间的内存不一致问题，但先前的工作要么对于跨 ISA DBT 系统不具有通用性，要么在转换过程中效率低下甚至容易出错。这项工作提出了 CrossMapping，这是一个通用的原始映射框架，用于增强现有 DBT 系统的跨 ISA 转换。通过协调不同 ISA 之间的内存一致性，CrossMapping 可以实现平滑的跨 ISA 转换并完成正确的仿真。 CrossMapping引入规范表以统一、精确的格式描述内存模型，有利于在方便的内存模型比较和分析的基础上推导并发基元映射方案。通过将导出的映射方案与现有的 DBT 系统和谐地集成，保证了跨 ISA 仿真的正确性。我们使用 PARSEC 基准套件在 QEMU 之上评估 x86、ARMv8 和 RISC-V 的 CrossMapping。结果表明，在ARMv8上仿真x86时平均性能提升可达8.5%，在RISC-V上仿真x86时平均性能提升可达7.3%。

papers.title: CyberStar: Simple, Elastic and Cost-Effective Network Functions Management in Cloud Network at Scale.
papers.abstract: Network functions (NFs) facilitate network operations and have become a critical service offered by cloud providers. One of the key challenges is how to meet the elastic requirements of massive traffic and diverse NF requests of tenants. This paper identifies the opportunity by leveraging cloud elastic compute services (ECS), i.e. containers or virtual machines, to provide the cloud-scale network function services, CyberStar. CyberStar introduces two key designs: (i) resource pooling based on a newly proposed three-tier architecture for scalable network functions; and (ii) on-demand resource assignment while maintaining high resource utilization in terms of both tenant demands and operation cost. Compared to the traditional NFs constructed over bare-metal servers, CyberStar can achieve 100Gbps bandwidth (6.7×) and scale to millions of connections within one second (20×).
papers.abstract_zh: 网络功能 (NF) 促进网络运营，并已成为云提供商提供的关键服务。如何满足租户海量流量和多样化的NF请求的弹性需求是关键挑战之一。本文确定了利用云弹性计算服务（ECS）（即容器或虚拟机）来提供云规模网络功能服务 Cyber​​Star 的机会。 Cyber​​Star引入了两个关键设计：（i）基于新提出的三层架构的资源池，以实现可扩展的网络功能； (ii)按需资源分配，同时在租户需求和运营成本方面保持高资源利用率。与在裸机服务器上构建的传统 NF 相比，Cyber​​Star 可以实现 100Gbps 带宽（6.7 倍），并可在一秒内扩展到数百万个连接（20 倍）。

papers.title: Data Caching for Enterprise-Grade Petabyte-Scale OLAP.
papers.abstract: With the exponential growth of data and evolving use cases, petabyte-scale OLAP data platforms are increasingly adopting a model that decouples compute from storage. This shift, evident in organizations like Uber and Meta, introduces operational challenges including massive, read-heavy I/O traffic with potential throttling, as well as skewed and fragmented data access patterns. Addressing these challenges, this paper introduces the Alluxio local (edge) cache, a highly effective architectural optimization tailored for such environments. This embeddable cache, optimized for petabyte-scale data analytics, leverages local SSD resources to alleviate network I/O and API call pressures, significantly improving data transfer efficiency. Integrated with OLAP systems like Presto and storage services like HDFS, the Alluxio local cache has demonstrated its effectiveness in handling large-scale, enterprise-grade workloads over three years of deployment at Uber and Meta. We share insights and operational experiences in implementing these optimizations, providing valuable perspectives on managing modern, massive-scale OLAP workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着数据的指数级增长和不断发展的用例，PB 级 OLAP 数据平台越来越多地采用将计算与存储分离的模型。这种转变在 Uber 和 Meta 等组织中很明显，带来了运营挑战，包括具有潜在限制的大量读取大量 I/O 流量，以及倾斜和碎片化的数据访问模式。为了解决这些挑战，本文介绍了 Alluxio 本地（边缘）缓存，这是一种针对此类环境量身定制的高效架构优化。这种嵌入式缓存针对 PB 级数据分析进行了优化，利用本地 SSD 资源缓解网络 I/O 和 API 调用压力，显着提高数据传输效率。与 Presto 等 OLAP 系统和 HDFS 等存储服务集成后，Alluxio 本地缓存在 Uber 和 Meta 的三年部署中证明了其在处理大规模企业级工作负载方面的有效性。我们分享实施这些优化的见解和操作经验，为管理现代大规模 OLAP 工作负载提供宝贵的视角。

papers.title: Diagnosing Application-network Anomalies for Millions of IPs in Production Clouds.
papers.abstract: Timely detection and diagnosis of application-network anomalies is a key challenge of operating large-scale production clouds. We reveal three practical issues in a cloud-native era. First, impact assessment of anomalies at a (micro)service level is absent in currently deployed monitoring systems. Ping systems are oblivious to the "actual weights'' of application traffic, e.g. , traffic volume and the number of connections/instances. Failures of critical (micro)services with large weights can be easily overlooked by probing systems under prevalent network jitters. Second, the efficiency of anomaly routing (to a blamed application/network team) is still low with multiple attribution teams involved. Third, collecting fine-grained metrics at a (micro)service level incurs considerable computational/storage overheads, however, is indispensable for accurate impact assessment and anomaly routing. We introduce the application-network diagnosing (AND) system in Alibaba cloud. AND exploits the single metric of TCP retransmission ( retxs ) to capture anomalies at (micro)service levels and correlates applications with networks end-to-end. To resolve deployment challenges, AND further proposes three core designs: (1) a collecting tool to perform filtering/statistics on massive retxs at the (micro)service level, (2) a real-time detection procedure to extract anomalies from ‘noisy’ retxs with millions of time series, (3) an anomaly routing model to delimit anomalies among multiple target teams/scenarios. AND has been deployed in Alibaba cloud for over three years and enables minute-level anomaly detection/routing and fast failure recovery.
papers.abstract_zh: 及时检测和诊断应用网络异常是运营大规模生产云的关键挑战。我们揭示了云原生时代的三个实际问题。首先，当前部署的监控系统中缺乏（微）服务级别的异常影响评估。 Ping 系统忽略了应用程序流量的“实际权重”，例如流量和连接/实例的数量。在普遍的网络抖动下，探测系统很容易忽视权重较大的关键（微）服务的故障。其次，由于涉及多个归因团队，异常路由（到受指责的应用程序/网络团队）的效率仍然很低。第三，在（微）服务级别收集细粒度的指标会产生相当大的成本。然而，计算/存储开销对于准确的影响评估和异常路由是必不可少的，AND利用TCP重传（retx）的单一指标来捕获（微）服务级别的异常并将应用程序与网络端到端相关联，并进一步提出了三个核心设计：（1）对大规模retx进行过滤/统计的收集工具。 （微）服务级别，（2）从数百万个时间序列的“嘈杂”retx中提取异常的实时检测程序，（3）用于在多个目标团队/场景之间划分异常的异常路由模型，并且已经在阿里云中部署了三年多，并实现了分钟级的异常检测/路由和快速故障恢复。

papers.title: Efficient Decentralized Federated Singular Vector Decomposition.
papers.abstract: Federated singular value decomposition (SVD) is a foundation for many real-world distributed applications. Existing federated SVD studies either require external servers which downgrade privacy protection or leverage homomorphic encryption (HE) to get rid of external servers ( e.g. , being decentralized) but suffer from significant inefficiencies caused by extensive computational and communication overhead. This paper presents Excalibur, an efficient decentralized federated SVD system. At its core, Excalibur proposes a lightweight matrix protection method to reduce the computational degradation caused by cryptographic operations, improving computation performance. Furthermore, it designs a communication-efficient decentralized SVD workflow based on the quantitative analysis of the design space, optimizing communication performance. To validate the efficiency of Excalibur, we implement a fully functional Excalibur system and evaluate it with real-world applications. Our results show that Excalibur not only removes the external servers but also achieves 3.1× ~ 6.0× faster performance than state-of-the-art (SOTA) server-aided method on different shapes of billion-scale data. In addition, Excalibur exhibits > 23000× larger throughput than the SOTA HE-based system.
papers.abstract_zh: 联合奇异值分解 (SVD) 是许多现实世界分布式应用程序的基础。现有的联合 SVD 研究要么需要降低隐私保护的外部服务器，要么利用同态加密 (HE) 来摆脱外部服务器（例如去中心化），但由于大量的计算和通信开销而导致效率显着低下。本文介绍了 Excalibur，一种高效的去中心化联合 SVD 系统。 Excalibur的核心提出了一种轻量级的矩阵保护方法，以减少密码操作造成的计算退化，提高计算性能。此外，基于设计空间的定量分析，设计了一种通信高效的去中心化SVD工作流程，优化了通信性能。为了验证 Excalibur 的效率，我们实现了功能齐全的 Excalibur 系统，并通过实际应用对其进行了评估。我们的结果表明，Excalibur 不仅消除了外部服务器，而且在不同形状的十亿级数据上实现了比最先进 (SOTA) 服务器辅助方法快 3.1 倍 ~ 6.0 倍的性能。此外，Excalibur 的吞吐量比基于 SOTA HE 的系统高出 23000 倍以上。

papers.title: Efficient Large Graph Processing with Chunk-Based Graph Representation Model.
papers.abstract: Existing external graph processing systems face challenges in terms of low I/O efficiency, expensive computation overhead, and high graph algorithm development costs when running on emerging NVMe SSDs, due to their reliance on complex loading and computing models that aim to convert numerous random I/Os into a few sequential I/Os. While in-memory graph systems working with memory-storage cache systems like OS page cache or TriCache, offer a promising solution for large graph processing with fine-grained I/Os and easy algorithm programming, they often overlook the specific characteristics of graph applications, resulting in inefficient graph processing. To address these challenges, we introduce ChunkGraph, an I/O-efficient graph system designed for processing large-scale graphs on NVMe SSDs. ChunkGraph introduces a novel chunk-based graph representation model, featuring classified and hierarchical vertex storage, and efficient chunk layout optimization. Evaluations show that ChunkGraph can outperform existing external graph systems, as well as in-memory graph systems relying on general cache systems, running several times faster.
papers.abstract_zh: 现有的外部图处理系统在新兴的NVMe SSD上运行时，由于依赖复杂的加载和计算模型，将大量的随机I/O转换为少量的顺序I/O，因此面临I/O效率低、计算开销大、图算法开发成本高等挑战。虽然内存中图形系统与操作系统页面缓存或 TriCache 等内存存储缓存系统配合使用，为具有细粒度 I/O 和简单算法编程的大型图形处理提供了一种有前途的解决方案，但它们经常忽略图形应用程序的特定特征，从而导致图形处理效率低下。为了应对这些挑战，我们推出了 ChunkGraph，这是一种 I/O 高效的图形系统，专为处理 NVMe SSD 上的大规模图形而设计。 ChunkGraph 引入了一种新颖的基于块的图表示模型，具有分类和分层顶点存储以及高效的块布局优化。评估表明，ChunkGraph 的性能可以优于现有的外部图系统，以及依赖于通用缓存系统的内存中图系统，运行速度快数倍。

papers.title: Enhancing Resource Management of the World's Largest PCDN System for On-Demand Video Streaming.
papers.abstract: The rapid growth of video services has led to the significant requirement for efficient content delivery. Traditional approaches mainly rely on Content Delivery Networks (CDNs), which unfortunately incur significant bandwidth cost for video providers. To resolve this problem, the cost-efficient edge resources have emerged as a new solution to replace CDNs. However, their heterogeneous hardware and poor performance still present challenges in their effective utilization. In this paper, we present how ByteDance explores the use of these cost-efficient but less performant resources. Specifically, we first present an extensive overview of PCDN, ByteDance's alternative delivery network for CDNs. Second, as PCDN encounters significant resource imbalances after years of deployment, we further introduce PCDN + , the enhanced iteration of PCDN. Specifically, by integrating a well-designed centralized/decentralized framework, we evolve previous "static'' and "uncontrolled'' PCDN into a "dynamic'' and "controlled'' system. The extensive A/B test and real-world deployment have demonstrated that PCDN + 1) effectively alleviates overloading issues, 2) significantly improves the utilization of low-cost resources, and 3) provides higher service speed.
papers.abstract_zh: 视频服务的快速增长引发了对高效内容交付的巨大需求。传统方法主要依赖内容交付网络 (CDN)，不幸的是，这会给视频提供商带来大量带宽成本。为了解决这个问题，经济高效的边缘资源作为替代 CDN 的新解决方案应运而生。然而，它们的异构硬件和较差的性能仍然给它们的有效利用带来了挑战。在本文中，我们介绍了字节跳动如何探索这些经济高效但性能较差的资源的使用。具体来说，我们首先对 PCDN（字节跳动的 CDN 替代交付网络）进行全面概述。其次，由于PCDN经过多年的部署，遇到了严重的资源不平衡问题，我们进一步引入了PCDN+，即PCDN的增强迭代。具体来说，通过集成精心设计的集中式/分散式框架，我们将以前“静态”和“不受控”的PCDN演变成“动态”和“受控”的系统。广泛的A/B测试和实际部署证明PCDN+1）有效缓解过载问题，2）显着提高低成本资源的利用率，3）提供更高的服务速度。

papers.title: ETC: An Elastic Transmission Control Using End-to-End Available Bandwidth Perception.
papers.abstract: Researchers and practitioners have proposed various transport protocols to keep up with advances in networks and the applications that use them. Current Wide Area Network protocols strive to identify a congestion signal to make distributed but fair judgments. However, existing congestion signals such as RTT and packet loss can only be observed after congestion occurs. We therefore propose Elastic Transmission Control (ETC). ETC exploits the instantaneous receipt rate of N consecutive packets as the congestion signal. We refer to this as the pulling rate , as we posit that the receipt rate can be used to "pull'' the sending rate towards a fair share of the capacity. Naturally, this signal can be measured prior to congestion, as senders can access it immediately after the acknowledgment of the first N packets. Exploiting the pulling rate measurements, ETC calculates the optimal rate update steps following a simple elastic principle: the further away from the pulling rate, the faster the sending rate increases. We conduct extensive experiments using both simulated and real networks. Our results show that ETC outperforms the state-of-the-art protocols in terms of both throughput (15% higher than Copa) and latency (20% lower than BBR). Besides, ETC shows superiority in convergence speed and fairness, with a 10× improvement in convergence time even compared to the protocol with the best convergence performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 研究人员和从业者提出了各种传输协议，以跟上网络和使用它们的应用程序的进步。当前的广域网协议致力于识别拥塞信号，以做出分布式但公平的判断。然而，现有的拥塞信号，如RTT、丢包等，只有在拥塞发生后才能观察到。因此，我们提出弹性传输控制（ETC）。 ETC利用N个连续数据包的瞬时接收率作为拥塞信号。我们将其称为拉动速率，因为我们假设接收速率可用于将发送速率“拉动”到容量的公平份额。当然，可以在拥塞之前测量该信号，因为发送者可以在确认前 N 个数据包后立即访问它。利用拉动速率测量，ETC 遵循简单的弹性原理计算最佳速率更新步骤：距离拉动速率越远，发送速率增加越快。我们使用模拟和我们的结果表明，ETC 在吞吐量（比 Copa 高 15%）和延迟（比 BBR 低 20%）方面都优于最先进的协议。此外，ETC 在收敛速度和公平性方面表现出优势，即使与收敛性能最好的协议相比，收敛时间也提高了 10 倍。

papers.title: Ethane: An Asymmetric File System for Disaggregated Persistent Memory.
papers.abstract: The ultra-fast persistent memories (PMs) promise a practical solution towards high-performance distributed file systems. This paper examines and reveals a cascade of three performance and cost issues in the current PM provision scheme, namely expensive cross-node interaction, weak single-node capability, and costly scale-out performance, which not only underutilizes fast PM devices but also magnifies its limited storage capacity and high price deficiencies. To remedy this, we introduce Ethane, a file system built on disaggregated persistent memory (DPM). Through resource separation using fast connectivity technologies, DPM achieves efficient and cost-effective PM sharing while retaining low-latency memory access. To unleash such hardware potentials, Ethane incorporates an asymmetric file system architecture inspired by the imbalanced resource provision feature of DPM. It splits a file system into a control-plane FS and a data-plane FS and designs these two planes to make the best use of the respective hardware resources. Evaluation results demonstrate that Ethane reaps the DPM hardware benefits, performs up to 68× better than modern distributed file systems, and improves data-intensive application throughputs by up to 17×.
papers.abstract_zh: 超高速持久存储器 (PM) 有望为高性能分布式文件系统提供实用的解决方案。本文研究并揭示了当前PM提供方案中一系列的三个性能和成本问题，即昂贵的跨节点交互、弱的单节点能力和昂贵的横向扩展性能，这不仅没有充分利用快速PM设备，而且放大了其有限的存储容量和高价格的缺陷。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 Ethane，一种基于分解持久内存 (DPM) 构建的文件系统。通过使用快速连接技术进行资源分离，DPM 实现高效且经济高效的 PM 共享，同时保留低延迟内存访问。为了释放此类硬件潜力，Ethane 采用了受 DPM 不平衡资源提供功能启发的非对称文件系统架构。它将文件系统分为控制平面FS和数据平面FS，并设计这两个平面以充分利用各自的硬件资源。评估结果表明，Ethan 获得了 DPM 硬件优势，其性能比现代分布式文件系统高出 68 倍，并将数据密集型应用程序吞吐量提高了 17 倍。

papers.title: Evaluating Chiplet-based Large-Scale Interconnection Networks via Cycle-Accurate Packet-Parallel Simulation.
papers.abstract: The Chiplet architecture has achieved great success in recent years. However, chiplet-based networks are significantly different from traditional networks, thus presenting new challenges in evaluation. On the one hand, on-chiplet and off-chiplet networks are tightly coupled; therefore, the entire heterogeneous network must be designed and evaluated jointly rather than separately. On the other hand, existing network simulators cannot efficiently evaluate large-scale chiplet-based networks with cycle-accurate accuracy. In this paper, we present the design and implementation of the Chiplet Network Simulator (CNSim) , a cycle-accurate packet-parallel simulator supporting efficient simulation for large-scale chiplet-based (shared-memory) networks. In CNSim , a packet-centric simulation architecture and an atomic-based hyper-threading mechanism are adopted, accelerating simulation speed by 11× ~ 14× compared with existing cycle-accurate simulators. Besides, we implement the heterogeneous router/link microarchitecture and many other features, including hierarchical topologies, adaptive routing, and real workload traces integration. Based on CNSim , two typical chiplet-based networks, which cannot be efficiently simulated by existing simulators, are systematically evaluated. The advantages and limitations of chiplet-based networks are revealed through systematical cycle-accurate simulations. The simulator and evaluation framework are open-sourced to the community.
papers.abstract_zh: Chiplet架构近年来取得了巨大成功。然而，基于chiplet的网络与传统网络显着不同，从而给评估带来了新的挑战。一方面，chiplet内和chiplet外网络紧密耦合；因此，整个异构网络必须联合设计和评估，而不是单独设计和评估。另一方面，现有的网络模拟器无法以周期精确的精度有效评估基于小芯片的大规模网络。在本文中，我们介绍了 Chiplet 网络模拟器 (CNSim) 的设计和实现，这是一种周期精确的数据包并行模拟器，支持大规模基于 Chiplet 的（共享内存）网络的高效模拟。 CNSim采用了以数据包为中心的仿真架构和基于原子的超线程机制，与现有的周期精确仿真器相​​比，仿真速度提高了11倍~14倍。此外，我们还实现了异构路由器/链路微架构和许多其他功能，包括分层拓扑、自适应路由和真实工作负载跟踪集成。基于CNSim，对现有模拟器无法有效模拟的两种典型的基于chiplet的网络进行了系统评估。通过系统的周期精确仿真揭示了基于小芯片的网络的优点和局限性。模拟器和评估框架向社区开源。

papers.title: Every Mapping Counts in Large Amounts: Folio Accounting.
papers.abstract: Operating systems can significantly enhance performance by utilizing large contiguous memory regions, even when the memory is not mapped using huge pages, by streamlining memory management. To harness these advantages, Linux has introduced "folios," representing multiple contiguous pages. Unlike traditional huge pages, folios can be partially mapped, which complicates folio accounting and hinders both performance and memory savings. Accurate and efficient folio accounting is crucial for optimizing memory management operations, enforcing various memory management policies, and performing Unique Set Size accounting in the operating system. In particular, determining whether a folio is exclusively mapped in a single address space is essential for avoiding unnecessary Copy-On-Write operations when memory is no longer shared. We introduce a novel tracking scheme to determine, with negligible overhead, whether a folio is exclusively mapped in a single address space. Our solution achieves a memory overhead that grows sublinearly with the number of pages per folio. By implementing our method in Linux, we demonstrate a notable improvement in fork and unmap operations by 1.9x and 4.2x respectively, and in the performance of fork-intensive workloads, such as Redis, achieving up to a 2.2x speedup.
papers.abstract_zh: 操作系统可以通过利用大的连续内存区域，通过简化内存管理来显着提高性能，即使内存没有使用大页面映射。为了利用这些优势，Linux 引入了“folios”，代表多个连续的页面。与传统的大页面不同，作品集可以进行部分映射，这使作品集统计变得复杂，并影响性能和内存节省。准确高效的作品集记帐对于优化内存管理操作、实施各种内存管理策略以及在操作系统中执行唯一集大小记帐至关重要。特别是，确定作品集是否专门映射到单个地址空间对于避免内存不再共享时不必要的写入时复制操作至关重要。我们引入了一种新颖的跟踪方案，以可忽略的开销来确定作品集是否专门映射在单个地址空间中。我们的解决方案实现的内存开销随着每个作品集的页数呈次线性增长。通过在 Linux 中实现我们的方法，我们证明了 fork 和 unmap 操作分别显着提高了 1.9 倍和 4.2 倍，并且 fork 密集型工作负载（例如 Redis）的性能实现了高达 2.2 倍的加速。

papers.title: Expeditious High-Concurrency MicroVM SnapStart in Persistent Memory with an Augmented Hypervisor.
papers.abstract: The industry has embraced snapshotting to tackle the cold starts and efficiently manage numerous short-lived functions for microservice-native architectures, serverless computing, and machine learning inference. A cutting-edge research approach FaaSnap, while innovative in reducing page faults during on-demand paging through prefetching the profiled working set pages into DRAM, incurs high caching overheads and I/O demands, potentially degrading system efficiency and limiting concurrent MicroVM executions. This paper introduces PASS, a system leveraging byte-addressable persistent memory (PMEM) for cost-effective and highly concurrent MicroVM SnapStart execution. PASS, functioning as a PMEM-aware augmented hypervisor in the user space, revolutionizes MicroVM memory restoration. It constructs complete address indexing of the guest memory mapped to single-tier PMEM space, enabling zero-copy on-demand paging by exploiting PMEM's direct access feature. This approach bypasses the cache layer and maintains guest OS transparency, avoiding invasive modifications. Experimental results, derived from real-world applications, reveal that PASS substantially decreases SnapStart execution time, achieving up to 72% reduction compared to the Firecracker hypervisor on the PMEM filesystem, and 47% reduction compared to FaaSnap. Moreover, PASS achieves double the maximum concurrency compared to both Firecracker and FaaSnap. It improves the cost-effectiveness by 2.2x and 1.6x over the Firecracker and FaaSnap, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 业界已经采用快照来解决冷启动问题，并有效管理微服务本机架构、无服务器计算和机器学习推理的大量短期功能。尖端研究方法 FaaSnap 虽然通过将分析工作集页面预取到 DRAM 来减少按需分页期间的页面错误，但会产生高缓存开销和 I/O 需求，可能会降低系统效率并限制并发 MicroVM 执行。本文介绍了 PASS，这是一个利用字节可寻址持久内存 (PMEM) 实现经济高效且高度并发的 MicroVM SnapStart 执行的系统。 PASS 在用户空间中充当 PMEM 感知增强管理程序，彻底改变了 MicroVM 内存恢复。它构建了映射到单层 PMEM 空间的客户内存的完整地址索引，通过利用 PMEM 的直接访问功能来实现零复制按需分页。这种方法绕过缓存层并保持来宾操作系统透明度，避免侵入性修改。来自实际应用程序的实验结果表明，PASS 显着减少了 SnapStart 执行时间，与 PMEM 文件系统上的 Firecracker 虚拟机管理程序相比，减少了 72%，与 FaaSnap 相比，减少了 47%。此外，与 Firecracker 和 FaaSnap 相比，PASS 的最大并发量提高了一倍。与 Firecracker 和 FaaSnap 相比，其成本效益分别提高了 2.2 倍和 1.6 倍。

papers.title: Exploit both SMART Attributes and NAND Flash Wear Characteristics to Effectively Forecast SSD-based Storage Failures in Clusters.
papers.abstract: Solid State Drives (SSDs) based on flash technology are extensively employed as high-performance storage solutions in supercomputing data centers. However, SSD failures are frequent in these environments, resulting in significant performance issues. To ensure the reliability and accessibility of HPC storage systems, it is crucial to predict failures in advance, enabling timely preventive measures. Although many failure prediction methods focus on improving SMART attributes and system telemetry logs, their predictive efficacy is constrained due to the limited capacity of these logs to directly elucidate the root causes of SSD failures at the device level. In this paper, we revisit the underlying causes of SSD failures and first utilize the device-level flash wear characteristics of SSDs as a critical indicator instead of solely relying on SMRAT data. We propose a novel Aging-Aware Pseudo Twin Network (APTN) based SSD failure prediction approach, exploiting both SMART and device-level NAND flash wear characteristics, to effectively forecast SSD failures. In practice, we also adapt APTN to the online learning framework. Our evaluation results demonstrate that APTN improves the F1-score by 51.2% and TPR by 40.1% on average compared to the existing schemes. This highlights the potential of leveraging device-level wear characteristics in conjunction with SMART attributes for more accurate and reliable SSD failure prediction.
