The service also automatically applies caching when and where it is performance/cost-effective to reuse preprocessed data within and across jobs. Our key contributions are autoscaling and autocaching policies, which leverage domain-specific metrics collected at data workers and training clients (rather than generic resource utilization metrics) to minimize training time and cost. Compared to scaling workers with Kubernetes, Cachew's policies reduce training time by up to 4.1x and training cost by 1.1x to 3.8x.
papers.abstract_zh: 处理输入数据在机器学习训练中起着至关重要的作用，影响准确性、吞吐量和成本。输入管道负责向需要大量数据的 GPU/TPU 提供训练示例，是一个常见的瓶颈。缓解数据停滞对于用户来说至关重要但又充满挑战。虽然当今的框架提供了最大化输入管道吞吐量的机制（例如，在远程 CPU 工作线程上分配数据处理和/或重用缓存的数据转换），但利用这些机制来联合优化训练时间和成本并非易事。用户面临两个关键挑战。首先，ML调度器专注于GPU/TPU资源，让用户自己优化数据处理的多维资源分配。其次，输入管道通常会消耗过多的计算能力来重复转换相同的数据。决定缓存哪个源数据或转换后的数据并非易事：大型数据集的存储成本很高，缓存节省的计算时间并不总是端到端训练的瓶颈，并且转换可能不是确定性的，因此重用转换后的数据可能会影响准确性。我们提出了 Cachew，这是一种用于 ML 数据处理的完全托管服务。 Cachew 动态扩展数据处理的分布式资源，以避免训练作业停滞。该服务还会在性能/成本效益较高的情况下自动应用缓存，以在作业内和作业间重用预处理数据。我们的主要贡献是自动扩展和自动缓存策略，它们利用数据工作者和培训客户收集的特定领域指标（而不是通用资源利用率指标）来最大程度地减少培训时间和成本。与使用 Kubernetes 扩展工作人员相比，Cachew 的策略可将训练时间减少多达 4.1 倍，并将训练成本减少 1.1 倍至 3.8 倍。

papers.title: Campo: Cost-Aware Performance Optimization for Mixed-Precision Neural Network Training.
papers.abstract: Mixed precision training uses a mixture of full and lower precisions for neural network (NN) training. Applying mixed precision must cast tensors in NN from float32 (FP32) to float16 (FP16) or vice versa. The existing strategy greedily applies FP16 to performance-critical operations without quantifying and considering the casting cost. However, we reveal that the casting cost can take more than 21% of NN operation execution time, and in some cases surpasses the performance benefit of using low precision. In this paper, we introduce Campo, a tool that improves performance of mixed-precision NN training with the awareness of casting costs. Campo is built upon performance modeling that predicts the casting cost and operation performance with low precision, and introduces a cost-aware graph rewriting strategy. Campo is user-transparent, and enables high performance NN training using mixed precision without training accuracy loss. Evaluating Campo with six NN models, we show that compared to TensorFlow using TF_AMP (a state-of-the-art performance optimizer for mixed precision training from Nvidia), Campo improves training throughput by 20.8% on average (up to 24.5%) on RTX 2080 Ti GPU and by 20.9% on average (up to 23.4%) on V100 GPU, without training accuracy loss. Because of using the cost-aware mixed precision training, Campo also improves energy efficiency by 21.4% on average (up to 24.2%), compared to TensorFlow using TF_AMP.
papers.abstract_zh: 混合精度训练混合使用全精度和低精度进行神经网络 (NN) 训练。应用混合精度必须将 NN 中的张量从 float32 (FP32) 转换为 float16 (FP16)，反之亦然。现有策略贪婪地将 FP16 应用于性能关键型操作，而没有量化和考虑铸造成本。然而，我们发现铸造成本可能会占用 NN 操作执行时间的 21% 以上，并且在某些情况下超过了使用低精度带来的性能优势。在本文中，我们介绍了 Campo，这是一种在考虑铸造成本的情况下提高混合精度神经网络训练性能的工具。 Campo 基于性能建模，以低精度预测铸造成本和操作性能，并引入了成本感知图重写策略。 Campo 是用户透明的，可以使用混合精度进行高性能神经网络训练，而不会损失训练精度。使用六个神经网络模型评估 Campo，我们发现与使用 TF_AMP（Nvidia 的最先进的混合精度训练性能优化器）的 TensorFlow 相比，Campo 在 RTX 2080 Ti GPU 上平均提高了 20.8%（高达 24.5%）的训练吞吐量，在 V100 GPU 上平均提高了 20.9%（高达 23.4%），且训练精度没有损失。由于使用成本感知的混合精度训练，与使用 TF_AMP 的 TensorFlow 相比，Campo 的能源效率平均提高了 21.4%（高达 24.2%）。

papers.title: CBMM: Financial Advice for Kernel Memory Managers.
papers.abstract: First-party datacenter workloads present new challenges to kernel memory management (MM), which allocates and maps memory and must balance competing performance concerns in an increasingly complex environment. In a datacenter, performance must be both good \textit{and} consistent to satisfy service-level objectives. Unfortunately, current MM designs often exhibit inconsistent, opaque behavior that is difficult to reproduce, decipher, or fix, stemming from (1) a lack of high-quality information for policymaking, (2) the cost-unawareness of many current MM policies, and (3) opaque and distributed policy implementations that are hard to debug. For example, the Linux huge page implementation is distributed across 8 files and can lead to page fault latencies in the 100s of ms. In search of a MM design that has consistent behavior, we designed Cost-Benefit MM (CBMM), which uses empirically based cost-benefit models and pre-aggregated profiling information to make MM policy decisions. In CBMM, policy decisions follow the guiding principle that \textit{userspace benefits must outweigh userspace costs}. This approach balances the performance benefits obtained by a kernel policy against the cost of applying it. CBMM has competitive performance with Linux and HawkEye, a recent research system, for all the workloads we ran, and in the presence of fragmentation, CBMM is 35% faster than Linux on average. Meanwhile, CBMM nearly always has better tail latency than Linux or HawkEye, particularly on fragmented systems. It reduces the cost of the most expensive soft page faults by 2-3 orders of magnitude for most of our workloads, and reduces the frequency of 10-1000 mu s-long faults by around 2 orders of magnitude for multiple workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 第一方数据中心工作负载给内核内存管理 (MM) 带来了新的挑战，内核内存管理 (MM) 分配和映射内存，并且必须在日益复杂的环境中平衡相互竞争的性能问题。在数据中心中，性能必须既良好又一致才能满足服务级别目标。不幸的是，当前的 MM 设计经常表现出不一致、不透明的行为，难以重现、破译或修复，原因是 (1) 缺乏用于决策的高质量信息，(2) 许多当前 MM 策略的成本意识，以及 (3) 难以调试的不透明和分布式策略实现。例如，Linux 大页面实现分布在 8 个文件中，可能导致数百毫秒的页面错误延迟。为了寻找具有一致行为的 MM 设计，我们设计了成本效益 MM (CBMM)，它使用基于经验的成本效益模型和预先聚合的分析信息来制定 MM 政策决策。在 CBMM 中，政策决策遵循\textit{用户空间收益必须超过用户空间成本}的指导原则。这种方法平衡了内核策略所获得的性能优势和应用它的成本。对于我们运行的所有工作负载，CBMM 的性能与 Linux 和 HawkEye（最近的研究系统）具有竞争力，并且在存在碎片的情况下，CBMM 平均比 Linux 快 35%。同时，CBMM 几乎总是比 Linux 或 HawkEye 具有更好的尾部延迟，特别是在碎片系统上。对于我们的大多数工作负载来说，它可以将最昂贵的软页面错误的成本降低 2-3 个数量级，对于多个工作负载来说，可以将 10-1000 mu s 长的错误频率降低大约 2 个数量级。

papers.title: Co-opting Linux Processes for High-Performance Network Simulation.
papers.abstract: Network experimentation tools are vitally important to the process of developing, evaluating, and testing distributed systems. The state-of-the-art simulation tools are either prohibitively inefficient at large scales or are limited by nontrivial architectural challenges, inhibiting their widespread adoption. In this paper, we present the design and implementation of Phantom, a novel tool for conducting distributed system experiments. In Phantom, a discrete-event network simulator directly executes unmodified applications as Linux processes and innovatively synthesizes efficient process control, system call interposition, and data transfer methods to co-opt the processes into the simulation environment. Our evaluation demonstrates that Phantom is up to 2.2× faster than Shadow, up to 3.4× faster than NS-3, and up to 43× faster than gRaIL in large P2P benchmarks while offering performance comparable to Shadow in large Tor network simulations.
papers.abstract_zh: 网络实验工具对于开发、评估和测试分布式系统的过程至关重要。最先进的仿真工具要么在大规模上效率低得令人望而却步，要么受到重大架构挑战的限制，从而阻碍了它们的广泛采用。在本文中，我们介绍了 Phantom 的设计和实现，这是一种用于进行分布式系统实验的新颖工具。在 Phantom 中，离散事件网络模拟器直接将未修改的应用程序作为 Linux 进程执行，并创新地综合了高效的进程控制、系统调用插入和数据传输方法，以将进程选入模拟环境中。我们的评估表明，在大型 P2P 基准测试中，Phantom 比 Shadow 快 2.2 倍，比 NS-3 快 3.4 倍，比 gRaIL 快 43 倍，同时在大型 Tor 网络模拟中提供与 Shadow 相当的性能。

papers.title: CoVA: Exploiting Compressed-Domain Analysis to Accelerate Video Analytics.
papers.abstract: Modern retrospective analytics systems leverage cascade architecture to mitigate bottleneck for computing deep neural networks (DNNs). However, the existing cascades suffer two limitations: (1) decoding bottleneck is either neglected or circumvented, paying significant compute and storage cost for pre-processing; and (2) the systems are specialized for temporal queries and lack spatial query support. This paper presents CoVA, a novel cascade architecture that splits the cascade computation between compressed domain and pixel domain to address the decoding bottleneck, supporting both temporal and spatial queries. CoVA cascades analysis into three major stages where the first two stages are performed in compressed domain while the last one in pixel domain. First, CoVA detects occurrences of moving objects (called blobs) over a set of compressed frames (called tracks). Then, using the track results, CoVA prudently selects a minimal set of frames to obtain the label information and only decode them to compute the full DNNs, alleviating the decoding bottleneck. Lastly, CoVA associates tracks with labels to produce the final analysis results on which users can process both temporal and spatial queries. Our experiments demonstrate that CoVA offers 4.8× throughput improvement over modern cascade systems, while imposing modest accuracy loss.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代回顾性分析系统利用级联架构来缓解计算深度神经网络 (DNN) 的瓶颈。然而，现有的级联有两个局限性：（1）解码瓶颈要么被忽略，要么被规避，为预处理付出了大量的计算和存储成本； (2)系统专门用于时间查询，缺乏空间查询支持。本文提出了 CoVA，一种新颖的级联架构，它将压缩域和像素域之间的级联计算分开，以解决解码瓶颈，支持时间和空间查询。 CoVA 将分析分为三个主要阶段，其中前两个阶段在压缩域中执行，最后一个阶段在像素域中执行。首先，CoVA 检测一组压缩帧（称为轨迹）上移动对象（称为斑点）的出现。然后，利用跟踪结果，CoVA 谨慎地选择最小的帧集来获取标签信息，并仅对它们进行解码以计算完整的 DNN，从而缓解解码瓶颈。最后，CoVA 将轨迹与标签相关联以生成最终分析结果，用户可以在该结果上处理时间和空间查询。我们的实验表明，与现代级联系统相比，CoVA 的吞吐量提高了 4.8 倍，同时带来了适度的精度损失。

papers.title: CRISP: Critical Path Analysis of Large-Scale Microservice Architectures.
papers.abstract: Microservice architectures have become the lifeblood of modern service-oriented software systems. Remote Procedure Calls (RPCs) among microservices are deeply nested, asynchronous, and large in number, thus making it very hard to identify the underlying service(s) that contribute to the overall end-to-end latency experienced by a top-level request. State-of-the-art RPC tracing tools collect a deluge of data but provide little insight. We need sophisticated tools to bubble-up signals from a myriad of RPC traces to assist developers in identifying optimization opportunities, pinpointing common bottlenecks, setting appropriate time outs, diagnosing error conditions, and planning and managing compute capacity, to name a few. In this paper, we present \tool{} --- a tool to perform critical path analysis (CPA) over a large number of traces collected from RPCs in microservices environments. \tool{} provides three critical performance analysis capabilities: a) a \emph{top-down} CPA of any specific endpoint, which is tailored for service owners to drill down the root causes of latency issues, b) a \emph{bottom-up} CPA over all endpoints in the system --- tailored for infrastructure and performance engineers --- to bubble up those (interior) APIs that have a high impact across many endpoints, and c) an on-the-fly anomaly detection to alert potential problems. We have applied \tool{}'s capabilities on \company{}'s entire backend system composed of sim 40K endpoints that cater to real-time requests from more than 100 million active daily users worldwide. Using the critical path as the basis of performance analysis has a) helped us identify five performance issues and optimization opportunities across two business-critical microservices, b) guided us in our future hardware choice that reduces end-to-end latencies, and c) reduced the false positives in anomaly detection by up to 50% while speeding up the training and inference by up to 28 times and up to 67 times, respectively, over the state of the art.
papers.abstract_zh: 微服务架构已经成为现代面向服务的软件系统的命脉。微服务之间的远程过程调用 (RPC) 是深度嵌套、异步且数量庞大的，因此很难识别导致顶级请求所经历的整体端到端延迟的底层服务。最先进的 RPC 跟踪工具收集了大量数据，但提供的洞察很少。我们需要复杂的工具来从大量 RPC 跟踪中提取信号，以帮助开发人员识别优化机会、查明常见瓶颈、设置适当的超时、诊断错误条件以及规划和管理计算容量等等。在本文中，我们提出了 \tool{}——一种对从微服务环境中的 RPC 收集的大量跟踪执行关键路径分析 (CPA) 的工具。 \tool{} 提供三种关键的性能分析功能：a) 任何特定端点的 \emph{自上而下} CPA，专为服务所有者量身定制，以深入了解延迟问题的根本原因；b) 系统中所有端点的 \emph{自下而上} CPA — 专为基础设施和性能工程师量身定制 — 用于冒泡那些对许多端点有较高影响的（内部）API；以及 c) 动态异常检测，以提醒潜在问题。我们已将 \tool{} 的功能应用于 \company{} 的由 sim 40K 端点组成的整个后端系统，以满足全球超过 1 亿活跃日常用户的实时请求。使用关键路径作为性能分析的基础，a) 帮助我们确定了两个业务关键型微服务中的五个性能问题和优化机会，b) 指导我们未来选择减少端到端延迟的硬件，以及 c) 将异常检测中的误报率减少了高达 50%，同时将训练和推理速度分别比现有技术提高了 28 倍和 67 倍。

papers.title: DepFast: Orchestrating Code of Quorum Systems.
papers.abstract: Quorum systems (e.g., replicated state machines) are critical distributed systems. Building correct, high-performance quorum systems is known to be hard. A major reason is that the protocols in quorum systems lead to non-deterministic state changes and complex branching conditions based on different events (e.g., timeouts). Traditionally, these systems are built with an asynchronous coding style with event-driven callbacks, but often lead to “callback hell” that makes code hard to follow and maintain. Converting to synchronous coding styles (e.g., using coroutines) is challenging because of the complex branching conditions. In this paper, we present Dependably Fast (DepFast), an effective, expressive framework for developing quorum systems. DepFast provides a unique QuorumEvent abstraction to enable building quorum systems in a synchronous style. It also supports composition of multiple events, e.g., timeouts, different quorums. To evaluate DepFast, we use it to implement two quorum systems, Raft and Copilot. We show that complex quorum systems implemented by DepFast are easy to write and have high performance. Specifically, it takes 25%–35% fewer lines of code to implement Raft and Copilot using DepFast, and the DepFast-based implementations have comparable performance with the state-of-the-art systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 仲裁系统（例如，复制状态机）是关键的分布式系统。众所周知，构建正确的、高性能的仲裁系统是很困难的。一个主要原因是仲裁系统中的协议会导致不确定的状态变化和基于不同事件（例如超时）的复杂分支条件。传统上，这些系统是使用具有事件驱动回调的异步编码风格构建的，但通常会导致“回调地狱”，使代码难以遵循和维护。由于复杂的分支条件，转换为同步编码风格（例如，使用协程）具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了 Dependively Fast (DepFast)，这是一种用于开发仲裁系统的有效、富有表现力的框架。 DepFast 提供了独特的 QuorumEvent 抽象，可以以同步方式构建仲裁系统。它还支持多个事件的组合，例如超时、不同的法定人数。为了评估 DepFast，我们用它来实现两个仲裁系统：Raft 和 Copilot。我们证明了 DepFast 实现的复杂仲裁系统易于编写且具有高性能。具体来说，使用 DepFast 实现 Raft 和 Copilot 所需的代码行数减少了 25%–35%，并且基于 DepFast 的实现具有与最先进系统相当的性能。

papers.title: Direct Access, High-Performance Memory Disaggregation with DirectCXL.
papers.abstract: New cache coherent interconnects such as CXL have recently attracted great attention thanks to their excellent hardware heterogeneity management and resource disaggregation capabilities. Even though there is yet no real product or platform integrating CXL into memory disaggregation, it is expected to make memory resources practically and efficiently disaggregated much better than ever before. In this paper, we propose directly accessible memory disaggregation, DirectCXL that straight connects a host processor complex and remote memory resources over CXL’s memory protocol ( CXL.mem ). To this end, we explore a practical design for CXL-based memory disaggregation and make it real. As there is no operating system that supports CXL, we also offer CXL software runtime that allows users to utilize the underlying disaggregated memory resources via sheer load/store instructions. Since DirectCXL does not require any data copies between the host memory and remote memory, it can expose the true performance of remote-side disaggregated memory resources to the users.
papers.abstract_zh: CXL等新型缓存一致性互连由于其出色的硬件异构管理和资源分解能力，最近引起了极大的关注。尽管目前还没有真正的产品或平台将 CXL 集成到内存分解中，但它有望使内存资源的分解比以往任何时候都更加实用、高效。在本文中，我们提出了可直接访问的内存分解 DirectCXL，它通过 CXL 的内存协议 (CXL.mem) 直接连接主机处理器复合体和远程内存资源。为此，我们探索了一种基于 CXL 的内存分解的实用设计，并将其变为现实。由于没有支持 CXL 的操作系统，我们还提供 CXL 软件运行时，允许用户通过纯粹的加载/存储指令利用底层分类内存资源。由于DirectCXL不需要主机内存和远程内存之间的任何数据复制，因此它可以向用户展示远程端分解内存资源的真实性能。

papers.title: DLOS: Effective Static Detection of Deadlocks in OS Kernels.
papers.abstract: Deadlocks in OS kernels can cause critical problems like performance degradation and system hangs. However, detecting deadlocks in OS kernels is quite challenging, due to high complexity of concurrent execution and large code bases of OS kernels. In this paper, we design a practical static analysis approach named DLOS, to effectively detect deadlocks in OS kernels. DLOS consists of three key techniques: (1) a summary-based lock-usage analysis to efficiently extract the code paths containing distinct locking constraints from kernel code; (2) a reachability-based comparison method to efficiently detect locking cycles from locking constraints; (3) a two-dimensional filtering strategy to effectively drop false positives by validating code-path feasibility and concurrency. We have evaluated DLOS on Linux 5.10, and find 54 real deadlocks, with a false positive rate of 17%. We have reported these deadlocks to Linux kernel developers, and 31 of them have been confirmed.
papers.abstract_zh: 操作系统内核中的死锁可能会导致性能下降和系统挂起等严重问题。然而，由于并发执行的高度复杂性和操作系统内核的庞大代码库，检测操作系统内核中的死锁非常具有挑战性。在本文中，我们设计了一种名为 DLOS 的实用静态分析方法，以有效检测操作系统内核中的死锁。 DLOS 包含三个关键技术：（1）基于摘要的锁使用分析，以有效地从内核代码中提取包含不同锁定约束的代码路径； (2)基于可达性的比较方法，从锁定约束中有效地检测锁定循环； (3) 二维过滤策略，通过验证代码路径可行性和并发性来有效降低误报。我们在 Linux 5.10 上评​​估了 DLOS，发现了 54 个真正的死锁，误报率为 17%。我们已向 Linux 内核开发人员报告了这些死锁，其中 31 个已得到确认。

papers.title: DVABatch: Diversity-aware Multi-Entry Multi-Exit Batching for Efficient Processing of DNN Services on GPUs.
papers.abstract: The DNN inferences are often batched for better utilizing the hardware in existing DNN serving systems. However, DNN serving exhibits diversity in many aspects, such as input, operator, and load. The unawareness of these diversities results in inefficient processing. Our investigation shows that the inefficiency roots in the feature of existing batching mechanism: one entry and one exit. Therefore, we propose DVABatch, a runtime batching system that enables the multi-entry multi-exit batching scheme for existing DNN serving system. We first abstract three meta operations for adjusting the ongoing batch of queries to achieve the multi-entry multi-exit scheme. The meta operations could be used to form different scheduling logics for different diversities. To deliver the meta operations to an ongoing batch, we slice the DNN models into multiple stages. Each stage corresponds to one executor, which is managed by a state transition diagram. Compared with state-of-the-art solutions, our experimental results show that DVABatch reduces 46.4% average latency and achieves up to 2.12× throughput improvement.
papers.abstract_zh: DNN 推理通常会进行批处理，以便更好地利用现有 DNN 服务系统中的硬件。然而，DNN 服务在输入、算子和负载等许多方面表现出多样性。对这些多样性的忽视会导致处理效率低下。我们的调查表明，效率低下的根源在于现有批处理机制的特点：一进一出。因此，我们提出了 DVABatch，一种运行时批处理系统，可为现有 DNN 服务系统提供多入口多出口批处理方案。我们首先抽象出三个元操作来调整正在进行的批量查询，以实现多入口多出口方案。元操作可用于针对不同的多样性形成不同的调度逻辑。为了将元操作交付给正在进行的批次，我们将 DNN 模型分为多个阶段。每个阶段对应一个执行器，由状态转换图管理。与最先进的解决方案相比，我们的实验结果表明，DVABatch 平均延迟降低了 46.4%，吞吐量提高了 2.12 倍。

papers.title: EPK: Scalable and Efficient Memory Protection Keys.
papers.abstract: As a hardware mechanism for facilitating intra-process memory isolation, Intel Memory Protection Keys (MPK) has been leveraged to efﬁciently improve the isolation, security, or performance of the software. However, it can only support 16 isolated memory domains, which signiﬁcantly limits its applicability in many scenarios. In this paper, we present EPK which leverages off-the-shelf virtualization hardware features to extend the number of available protection domains in MPK. To demonstrate the effectiveness of EPK, we apply it in three scenarios, including better memory isolation for server applications as well as Non-Volatile Memory (NVM) applications, and a fast InterProcess Communication (IPC) mechanism for microkernels. The evaluation results show that EPK can scale to provide hundreds of isolated domains. It can outperform the state-of-the-art (libmpk) by up to two orders of magnitude and usually achieve 95% of the performance of the system with no memory isolation.
papers.abstract_zh: 作为促进进程内内存隔离的硬件机制，英特尔内存保护密钥 (MPK) 已被用来有效提高软件的隔离性、安全性或性能。然而，它只能支持 16 个隔离内存域，这极大地限制了它在许多场景中的适用性。在本文中，我们提出了 EPK，它利用现成的虚拟化硬件功能来扩展 MPK 中可用保护域的数量。为了证明 EPK 的有效性，我们将其应用于三种场景，包括服务器应用程序和非易失性内存 (NVM) 应用程序的更好内存隔离，以及微内核的快速进程间通信 (IPC) 机制。评估结果表明，EPK 可以扩展以提供数百个隔离域。它的性能比最先进的（libmpk）高出两个数量级，并且通常可以在没有内存隔离的情况下实现系统 95% 的性能。

papers.title: Eric Brewer, VP Infrastructure, Google Fellow and Professor Emeritus, UC Berkeley.
papers.abstract: Wide-spread use of open-source software is a remarkable achievement, but also creates a tremendous responsibility. How can we collectively step up to ensure open-source software is worthy of the trust the world now expects and deserves? We cover a range of structural and security challenges and how we might address them, including our hopes for a more sustainable future.
papers.abstract_zh: 开源软件的广泛使用是一项了不起的成就，但也带来了巨大的责任。我们如何共同努力，确保开源软件值得当今世界所期望和应得的信任？我们讨论了一系列结构性和安全挑战以及我们如何应对这些挑战，包括我们对更加可持续的未来的希望。

papers.title: Faith: An Efficient Framework for Transformer Verification on GPUs.
papers.abstract: Transformer verification draws increasing attention in machine learning research and industry. It formally verifies the robustness of transformers against adversarial attacks such as exchanging words in a sentence with synonyms. However, the performance of transformer verification is still not satisfactory due to bound-centric computation which is significantly different from standard neural networks. In this paper, we propose \textbf{Faith}, an efficient framework for transformer verification on GPUs. We first propose a semantic-aware computation graph transformation to identify semantic information such as bound computation in transformer verification. We exploit such semantic information to enable efficient kernel fusion at the computation graph level. Second, we propose a verification-specialized kernel crafter to efficiently map transformer verification to modern GPUs. This crafter exploits a set of GPU hardware supports to accelerate verification-specialized operations which are usually memory-intensive. Third, we propose an expert-guided autotuning to incorporate expert knowledge on GPU backends to facilitate large search space exploration. Extensive evaluations show that Faith achieves 2.1 times to 3.4 times (2.6 times on average) speedup over state-of-the-art frameworks.
papers.abstract_zh: 变压器验证越来越受到机器学习研究和工业界的关注。它正式验证了 Transformer 对抗对抗性攻击（例如用同义词交换句子中的单词）的鲁棒性。然而，由于以边界为中心的计算与标准神经网络显着不同，变压器验证的性能仍然不令人满意。在本文中，我们提出了 \textbf{Faith}，这是一种在 GPU 上进行 Transformer 验证的有效框架。我们首先提出了一种语义感知计算图转换来识别语义信息，例如变压器验证中的绑定计算。我们利用此类语义信息来实现计算图级别的高效内核融合。其次，我们提出了一种专门用于验证的内核设计器，以有效地将变压器验证映射到现代 GPU。该工匠利用一组 GPU 硬件支持来加速通常占用大量内存的验证专用操作。第三，我们提出了一种专家引导的自动调整，将专家知识融入 GPU 后端，以促进大型搜索空间探索。广泛的评估表明，Faith 比最先进的框架实现了 2.1 至 3.4 倍（平均 2.6 倍）的加速。

papers.title: Faster Software Packet Processing on FPGA NICs with eBPF Program Warping.
papers.abstract: FPGA NICs can improve packet processing performance, however, programming them is difficult, and existing solutions to enable software packet processing on FPGA either provide limited packet processing speed, or require changes to programs and to their development/deployment life cycle. We address the issue with program warping, a new technique that improves throughput replacing several instructions of a packet processing program with an equivalent runtime programmable hardware implementation. Program warping performs static analysis of a packet processing program, described with Linux's eBPF, to identify subsets of the program that can be implemented by an optimized FPGA pipeline, the warp engine. Packets handled by the warp engine are eventually delivered to a regular eBPF program executor, along with their program context (registers, stack), to complete execution of those program parts that cannot be efficiently pipelined. We prototype program warping on a 100Gbps FPGA NIC, extending hXDP, a state-of-the-art eBPF processor for FPGA, and measure its performance running 6 unmodified real-world eBPF programs, including deployed applications such as Katran and Suricata. Our prototype runs at 250MHz, uses less than 15% of the FPGA resources, and improves hXDP throughput by 1.2-3x in most cases, and up to 18x.
papers.abstract_zh: FPGA NIC 可以提高数据包处理性能，但是对其进行编程很困难，并且在 FPGA 上启用软件数据包处理的现有解决方案要么提供有限的数据包处理速度，要么需要更改程序及其开发/部署生命周期。我们通过程序扭曲来解决这个问题，这是一种提高吞吐量的新技术，用等效的运行时可编程硬件实现替换数据包处理程序的多个指令。程序扭曲对使用 Linux 的 eBPF 描述的数据包处理程序进行静态分析，以识别可以由优化的 FPGA 管道（扭曲引擎）实现的程序子集。由 warp 引擎处理的数据包最终会连同它们的程序上下文（寄存器、堆栈）一起传递到常规 eBPF 程序执行器，以完成那些无法有效流水线化的程序部分的执行。我们在 100Gbps FPGA NIC 上对程序扭曲进行原型设计，扩展 hXDP（一种用于 FPGA 的最先进的 eBPF 处理器），并测量其运行 6 个未经修改的真实 eBPF 程序（包括 Katran 和 Suricata 等已部署应用程序）的性能。我们的原型运行频率为 250MHz，使用了不到 15% 的 FPGA 资源，并且在大多数情况下将 hXDP 吞吐量提高了 1.2-3 倍，最高可达 18 倍。

papers.title: Firebolt: Finding Bugs in Programmable Data Plane Generators.
papers.abstract: Programmable data planes (DP) enable flexible customization of packet processing logic with domain-specific languages such as P4. To relieve developers from lengthy codes and tedious hardware details, many researches propose DP program generators that take high-level intents as input and automatically convert intents into DP programs. Generators must be correct, otherwise they may produce buggy programs or DP logic that is inconsistent with intents. Nevertheless, existing verification tools are designed to verify individual DP programs, not generators. They either cannot achieve high bug coverage or cannot debug generators with high scalability. This paper presents Firebolt, a blackbox testing tool designed to dig out faults in DP program generators, including security vulnerabilities, intent violations, and generator crash. Firebolt achieves high bug coverage by using syntax-guided intent generation to construct a comprehensive, syntactically correct, and semantically valid intent set. To avoid intent explosion, Firebolt designs an intent space pruning approach that eliminates redundant intents while preserving representative ones. For high scalability, Firebolt automatically formalizes DP programs and intents for verification. We apply Firebolt to three popular open-source DP generators. Evaluation results demonstrate that Firebolt can detect 2x bugs with 0.1% to 0.01% human efforts compared to existing tools.
papers.abstract_zh: 可编程数据平面 (DP) 支持使用 P4 等领域特定语言灵活定制数据包处理逻辑。为了使开发人员摆脱冗长的代码和繁琐的硬件细节，许多研究提出了 DP 程序生成器，它将高级意图作为输入，并自动将意图转换为 DP 程序。生成器必须是正确的，否则可能会产生有缺陷的程序或与意图不一致的 DP 逻辑。然而，现有的验证工具旨在验证单个 DP 程序，而不是生成器。他们要么无法实现高错误覆盖率，要么无法调试具有高可扩展性的生成器。本文介绍了 Firebolt，这是一种黑盒测试工具，旨在挖掘 DP 程序生成器中的故障，包括安全漏洞、意图违规和生成器崩溃。 Firebolt 通过使用语法引导的意图生成来构建全面、语法正确且语义有效的意图集，从而实现高错误覆盖率。为了避免意图爆炸，Firebolt 设计了一种意图空间修剪方法，可以消除冗余意图，同时保留代表性意图。为了实现高可扩展性，Firebolt 自动形式化 DP 程序和意图以进行验证。我们将 Firebolt 应用于三种流行的开源 DP 生成器。评估结果表明，与现有工具相比，Firebolt 只需 0.1% 至 0.01% 的人力即可检测出 2 倍的错误。

papers.title: FlatFS: Flatten Hierarchical File System Namespace on Non-volatile Memories.
papers.abstract: The conventional file system provides a hierarchical namespace by structuring it as a directory tree. Tree-based namespace structure leads to inefficient file path walk and expensive namespace tree traversal, underutilizing ultra-low access latency and good sequential performance provided by non-volatile memory systems. This paper proposes FlatFS, a NVM file system that features a flat namespace architecture while provides a compatible hierarchical namespace view. FlatFS incorporates three novel techniques: coordinated file path walk model, range-optimized NVM-friendly B^{r} tree, and write-optimized compressed index key layout, to fully exploit flat namespace structure to improve file system namespace performance on high-performance NVMs. Evaluation results demonstrate that FlatFS achieves significant performance improvements for metadata-intensive benchmarks and real-world applications compared to other file systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 传统的文件系统通过将其构造为目录树来提供分层命名空间。基于树的命名空间结构导致低效的文件路径遍历和昂贵的命名空间树遍历，未充分利用非易失性存储系统提供的超低访问延迟和良好的顺序性能。本文提出了 FlatFS，一种 NVM 文件系统，具有平面命名空间架构，同时提供兼容的分层命名空间视图。 FlatFS 融合了三种新颖的技术：协调文件路径行走模型、范围优化的 NVM 友好 B^{r} 树和写优化的压缩索引键布局，以充分利用平面命名空间结构来提高高性能 NVM 上的文件系统命名空间性能。评估结果表明，与其他文件系统相比，FlatFS 在元数据密集型基准测试和实际应用程序方面实现了显着的性能改进。

papers.title: FpgaNIC: An FPGA-based Versatile 100Gb SmartNIC for GPUs.
papers.abstract: Given that the increasing rate of network bandwidth is far ahead of that of the compute capacity of host CPU, which by default processes network packets, SmartNIC has been introduced to offload packet processing, even application logic. Modern GPUs have already become a key computing engine in a broad range of applications such as Artificial Intelligence (AI) and High Performance Computing (HPC), which always need massive computing power that a single GPU server cannot afford. When processing these applications, the distributed pool of GPUs generates the majority of network traffic in a cluster of such servers. The commercially available multi-core SmartNICs, such as BlueFiled-2, fail to process 100Gb network traffic at line rate with its embedded CPU, which is capable of doing control-plane management only. The commercially available FPGA-based SmartNICs are mainly optimized for network applications that run on the host CPU. We intend to develop a GPU-oriented SmartNIC to accelerate a broad range of distributed applications on distributed GPUs. To this end, we present FpgaNIC, an FPGA-based GPU-centric versatile SmartNIC that enables direct PCIe P2P communication with local GPUs using GPU virtual address, and that provides reliable 100Gb hardware network transport to communicate with remote GPUs. The above two components consume fewer than 20% FPGA resources on a mid-size FPGA, so FpgaNIC has sufficient resources for a customized data-path accelerator that allows offloading complex compute tasks on the FPGA for line-rate in-network computing, thereby complementing the processing at the GPU. FpgaNIC has been designed to explore the design space of SmartNICs, e.g., direct, on-path, and off-path models, each of which benefits different types of applications. We believe that FpgaNIC opens up a wealth of research opportunities, e.g., accelerating a broad range of distributed applications by combining GPUs and FPGAs and exploring a larger design space of SmartNICs by making them easily accessible from local GPUs. FpgaNIC allows to prototype applications that can eventually be migrated to hardened SmartNICs.
papers.abstract_zh: 鉴于网络带宽的增长速度远远超过了默认处理网络数据包的主机CPU的计算能力，SmartNIC被引入来卸载数据包处理，甚至应用程序逻辑。现代 GPU 已经成为人工智能 (AI) 和高性能计算 (HPC) 等广泛应用中的关键计算引擎，这些应用始终需要单个 GPU 服务器无法承受的巨大计算能力。处理这些应用程序时，分布式 GPU 池会在此类服务器集群中生成大部分网络流量。市售的多核 SmartNIC（例如 BlueFiled-2）无法通过其嵌入式 CPU 以线速处理 100Gb 网络流量，该 CPU 只能进行控制平面管理。市售的基于 FPGA 的 SmartNIC 主要针对在主机 CPU 上运行的网络应用程序进行优化。我们打算开发面向 GPU 的 SmartNIC，以加速分布式 GPU 上的各种分布式应用程序。为此，我们推出了 FpgaNIC，这是一种基于 FPGA 的、以 GPU 为中心的多功能 SmartNIC，它能够使用 GPU 虚拟地址与本地 GPU 进行直接 PCIe P2P 通信，并提供可靠的 100Gb 硬件网络传输来与远程 GPU 进行通信。上述两个组件在中型 FPGA 上消耗的 FPGA 资源不到 20%，因此 FpgaNIC 有足够的资源用于定制数据路径加速器，允许将复杂的计算任务卸载到 FPGA 上进行线速网内计算，从而补充 GPU 的处理。 FpgaNIC 旨在探索 SmartNIC 的设计空间，例如直接、路径上和路径外模型，每种模型都有利于不同类型的应用程序。我们相信 FpgaNIC 开辟了丰富的研究机会，例如，通过结合 GPU 和 FPGA 来加速广泛的分布式应用，并通过使本地 GPU 轻松访问 SmartNIC 来探索更大的 SmartNIC 设计空间。 FpgaNIC 允许对应用程序进行原型设计，最终可以迁移到强化的 SmartNIC。

papers.title: Hardening Hypervisors with Ombro.
papers.abstract: This paper presents Ombro , a low-level virtual instruction set architecture (vISA) which enforces compiler-based security policies on real-world commodity hypervisors. We extend the Secure Virtual Architecture (which itself extends the LLVM compiler’s Intermediate Representation) to support the full set of hardware operations needed to run an x86 commodity hypervisor used in some of the world’s largest public clouds, namely, the Xen 4.12 hypervisor, running in full hardware-accelerated mode using Intel’s Virtual Machine Extensions (VMX). We have ported Xen 4.12 to the Ombro vISA and demonstrated that it can run unmodified guest VMs of real-world relevance (namely, Linux guests under Xen’s HVM and PVH modes). Furthermore, to demonstrate Ombro’s ability to harden hypervisors from attack, Ombro implements control flow integrity and the first protected shadow (split) stack for x86 hypervisors. Our performance results show that Ombro achieves this protection without imposing measurable overheads on most application benchmarks.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Ombro，一种低级虚拟指令集架构 (vISA)，它在现实世界的商品管理程序上强制执行基于编译器的安全策略。我们扩展了安全虚拟架构（其本身扩展了 LLVM 编译器的中间表示），以支持运行在一些世界上最大的公共云中使用的 x86 商品虚拟机管理程序（即 Xen 4.12 虚拟机管理程序）所需的全套硬件操作，该虚拟机管理程序使用英特尔虚拟机扩展 (VMX) 在完全硬件加速模式下运行。我们已将 Xen 4.12 移植到 Ombro vISA，并证明它可以运行与现实世界相关的未经修改的来宾 VM（即 Xen 的 HVM 和 PVH 模式下的 Linux 来宾）。此外，为了展示 Ombro 强化虚拟机管理程序免受攻击的能力，Ombro 为 x86 虚拟机管理程序实现了控制流完整性和第一个受保护的影子（分割）堆栈。我们的性能结果表明，Ombro 实现了这种保护，而无需对大多数应用程序基准施加可测量的开销。

papers.title: Hashing Design in Modern Networks: Challenges and Mitigation Techniques.
papers.abstract: Traffic load balancing across multiple paths is a critical task for modern networks to reduce network congestion and improve network efficiency. Hashing which is the foundation of traffic load balancing still faces practical challenges. The key problem is there is a growing need for more hash functions because networks are getting larger with more switches, more stages, and increased path diversity. Meanwhile, topology and routing become more agile in order to efficiently serve traffic demands with stricter throughput and latency SLAs. On the other hand, current generation switch chips only provide a limited number of uncorrelated hash functions. We first demonstrate why the limited number of hashing functions is a practical challenge in today's datacenter network (DCN) and wide-area network (WAN) designs. Then, to mitigate the problem, we propose a novel approach named color recombining which enables hash functions to reuse via leveraging topology traits of multi-stage DCN networks. We also describe a novel framework based on coprime theory to mitigate hash correlation in generic mesh topologies (i.e., spineless DCN and WAN). Our evaluation using real network trace data and topologies demonstrate that we can reduce the extent of load imbalance (measured by the coefficient of variation) by an order of magnitude.
papers.abstract_zh: 多条路径上的流量负载均衡是现代网络减少网络拥塞、提高网络效率的关键任务。作为流量负载均衡基础的哈希仍然面临着实际挑战。关键问题是对更多哈希函数的需求不断增长，因为网络变得越来越大，交换机越来越多，阶段越来越多，路径多样性也越来越多。同时，拓扑和路由变得更加敏捷，以便通过更严格的吞吐量和延迟 SLA 有效地满足流量需求。另一方面，当前一代交换芯片仅提供有限数量的不相关散列函数。我们首先演示为什么有限数量的哈希函数是当今数据中心网络 (DCN) 和广域网 (WAN) 设计中的实际挑战。然后，为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种名为颜色重组的新方法，它可以通过利用多级 DCN 网络的拓扑特征来重用哈希函数。我们还描述了一种基于互质理论的新颖框架，以减轻通用网状拓扑（即无骨干 DCN 和 WAN）中的哈希相关性。我们使用真实网络跟踪数据和拓扑进行的评估表明，我们可以将负载不平衡的程度（通过变异系数衡量）减少一个数量级。

papers.title: Help Rather Than Recycle: Alleviating Cold Startup in Serverless Computing Through Inter-Function Container Sharing.
papers.abstract: In serverless computing, each function invocation is executed in a container (or a Virtual Machine), and container cold startup results in long response latency. We observe that some functions suffer from cold container startup, while the warm containers of other functions are idle. Based on the observation, other than booting a new container for a function from scratch, we propose to alleviate the cold startup by re-purposing a warm but idle container from another function. We implement a container management scheme, named Pagurus, to achieve the purpose. Pagurus comprises an intra-function manager for replacing an idle warm container to be a container that other functions can use without introducing additional security issues, an inter-function scheduler for scheduling containers between functions, and a sharing-aware function balancer at the cluster-level for balancing the workload across different nodes. Experiments using Azure serverless traces show that Pagurus alleviates 84.6\% of the cold startup, and the cold startup latency is reduced from hundreds of milliseconds to 16 milliseconds if alleviated.
papers.abstract_zh: 在无服务器计算中，每个函数调用都在容器（或虚拟机）中执行，容器冷启动导致响应延迟较长。我们观察到某些功能遭受冷容器启动的影响，而其他功能的热容器处于空闲状态。根据观察，除了从头开始为某个功能启动一个新容器之外，我们建议通过重新利用另一个功能的热但空闲的容器来缓解冷启动。我们实施了一个名为Pagurus的容器管理方案来达到这个目的。 Pagurus 包括一个功能内管理器，用于将空闲的热容器替换为其他功能可以使用的容器，而不会引入额外的安全问题；一个功能间调度器，用于在功能之间调度容器；以及一个集群级别的共享感知功能平衡器，用于平衡不同节点之间的工作负载。使用 Azure 无服务器跟踪的实验表明，Pagurus 缓解了 84.6% 的冷启动，如果缓解的话，冷启动延迟从数百毫秒减少到 16 毫秒。

papers.title: High Throughput Replication with Integrated Membership Management.
papers.abstract: This paper introduces ChainPaxos, a new distributed consensus algorithm for high throughput replication. ChainPaxos organizes nodes in a chain, allowing for a pipeline communication pattern that maximizes throughput, by minimizing the number of messages transmitted. While other proposals have explored such patterns, ChainPaxos is the first that can execute linearizable reads in any replica with no communication overhead, relying only on information used to process updates. These techniques build on a fully specified integrated membership management solution, allowing ChainPaxos’s fault-tolerance to be independent of an external coordination service, often used in other solutions, which can lead to possible safety violations in the presence of network partitions. Our evaluation shows that, when compared with alternative Paxos variants, ChainPaxos exhibits significantly higher throughput and scalability with negligible latency impact. Compared to other solutions with similar communication patterns, besides avoiding the costs of an external coordination service, ChainPaxos’s high throughput tends to increase with the ratio of read-only operations.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 ChainPaxos，一种用于高吞吐量复制的新型分布式共识算法。 ChainPaxos 将节点组织在链中，允许通过最小化传输的消息数量来最大化吞吐量的管道通信模式。虽然其他提案已经探索了此类模式，但 ChainPaxos 是第一个可以在任何副本中执行线性化读取而无需通信开销、仅依赖于用于处理更新的信息的提案。这些技术建立在完全指定的集成会员管理解决方案的基础上，允许 ChainPaxos 的容错能力独立于外部协调服务（通常在其他解决方案中使用），这可能会导致在存在网络分区时可能导致安全违规。我们的评估表明，与其他 Paxos 变体相比，ChainPaxos 表现出明显更高的吞吐量和可扩展性，且延迟影响可以忽略不计。与其他具有类似通信模式的解决方案相比，除了避免外部协调服务的成本之外，ChainPaxos 的高吞吐量往往会随着只读操作的比例而增加。

papers.title: HyperEnclave: An Open and Cross-platform Trusted Execution Environment.
papers.abstract: A number of trusted execution environments (TEEs) have been proposed by both academia and industry. However, most of them require specific hardware or firmware changes and are bound to specific hardware vendors (such as Intel, AMD, ARM, and IBM). In this paper, we propose HyperEnclave, an open and cross-platform process-based TEE that relies on the widely-available virtualization extension to create the isolated execution environment. In particular, HyperEnclave is designed to support the flexible enclave operation modes to fulfill the security and performance demands under various enclave workloads. We provide the enclave SDK to run existing SGX programs on HyperEnclave with little or no source code changes. We have implemented HyperEnclave on commodity AMD servers and deployed the system in a world-leading FinTech company to support real-world privacy-preserving computations. The evaluation on both micro-benchmarks and application benchmarks shows the design of HyperEnclave introduces only a small overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 学术界和工业界已经提出了许多可信执行环境（TEE）。然而，大多数都需要特定的硬件或固件更改，并且绑定到特定的硬件供应商（例如 Intel、AMD、ARM 和 IBM）。在本文中，我们提出了 HyperEnclave，这是一种开放的、跨平台的、基于流程的 TEE，它依赖于广泛可用的虚拟化扩展来创建隔离的执行环境。特别是，HyperEnclave 旨在支持灵活的 Enclave 操作模式，以满足各种 Enclave 工作负载下的安全和性能需求。我们提供 enclave SDK，以便在 HyperEnclave 上运行现有的 SGX 程序，只需很少或无需更改源代码。我们在商用 AMD 服务器上实施了 HyperEnclave，并将该系统部署在世界领先的金融科技公司中，以支持现实世界的隐私保护计算。对微基准测试和应用程序基准测试的评估表明，HyperEnclave 的设计仅引入了很小的开销。

papers.title: Investigating Managed Language Runtime Performance: Why JavaScript and Python are 8x and 29x slower than C++, yet Java and Go can be Faster?
papers.abstract: The most widely used programming languages today are managed languages. They are popular because their vast features improve many aspects of code development, including increased productivity and safety. However, as a product or service scales in usage, performance issues become a problem. Developers are then often faced with complex choices as they must decide whether the desired performance can be squeezed from existing code, or whether their language has reached its performance limits, requiring years of code to be ported to a new more-performant language. To make matters worse, runtime performance is shrouded in mystery as it involves complex interactions of different components, such as interpreter, just-in-time (JIT) compiler, thread library, and Garbage Collection (GC) system. We present an in-depth performance analysis and comparison of Java, Go, JavaScript, and Python, using C++ as a baseline. We carefully instrumented the different language runtimes, so that developers can precisely measure the number of cycles taken to execute any bytecode instruction, or the overhead of dynamic type checking in JavaScript. This allows us to accurately identify sources of overhead. We further created 6 applications from the ground up to establish the LangBench benchmark; the applications cover a range of complexity, and they cover a variety of application scenarios differing in compute intensity, memory usage, network and disk I/O intensity, and available concurrency. We comprehensively analyze their completion times, resource usage, and scalability. Overall, we found that V8/Node.js and CPython exhibit excessive overheads, executing applications 8.01x and 29.50x slower on average than their C++ counterparts, respectively. Making matters worse, applications on these two runtimes scale poorly in that they cannot effectively utilize more than one core. In contrast, OpenJDK and Go applications are performance competitive to C++, running only 1.43x and 1.30x slower, respectively, and they can easily scale to multiple cores. There are applications where OpenJDK and Go outperform their C++ counterparts.
papers.abstract_zh: 当今使用最广泛的编程语言是托管语言。它们之所以受欢迎，是因为它们的丰富功能改善了代码开发的许多方面，包括提高生产力和安全性。然而，随着产品或服务的使用规模扩大，性能问题就成为一个问题。然后，开发人员经常面临复杂的选择，因为他们必须决定是否可以从现有代码中榨取所需的性能，或者他们的语言是否已达到其性能极限，需要多年的代码才能移植到新的性能更高的语言。更糟糕的是，运行时性能笼罩在神秘之中，因为它涉及不同组件的复杂交互，例如解释器、即时 (JIT) 编译器、线程库和垃圾收集 (GC) 系统。我们以 C++ 作为基准，对 Java、Go、JavaScript 和 Python 进行了深入的性能分析和比较。我们仔细检测了不同的语言运行时，以便开发人员可以精确测量执行任何字节码指令所需的周期数，或 JavaScript 中动态类型检查的开销。这使我们能够准确地识别开销来源。我们进一步从头开始创建了 6 个应用程序来建立 LangBench 基准；这些应用程序涵盖了一系列复杂性，并且涵盖了计算强度、内存使用、网络和磁盘 I/O 强度以及可用并发数方面不同的各种应用场景。我们全面分析它们的完成时间、资源使用情况和可扩展性。总体而言，我们发现 V8/Node.js 和 CPython 表现出过多的开销，执行应用程序的速度平均分别比 C++ 慢 8.01 倍和 29.50 倍。更糟糕的是，这两个运行时上的应用程序扩展性很差，因为它们无法有效地利用多个内核。相比之下，OpenJDK 和 Go 应用程序的性能与 C++ 相比具有竞争力，运行速度分别仅慢 1.43 倍和 1.30 倍，并且它们可以轻松扩展到多核。在某些应用程序中，OpenJDK 和 Go 的性能优于 C++ 同类应用程序。

papers.title: IPLFS: Log-Structured File System without Garbage Collection.
papers.abstract: In this work, we develop the log-structured filesystem that is free from garbage collection. There are two key technical ingredients: \emph{IPLFS}, a log-structured filesystem for infinite partition, and \emph{Interval Mapping}, a space-efficient LBA-to-PBA mapping for infinite filesystem partition. In IPLFS, we separate the filesystem partition size from the physical storage size and set the size of the logical partition large enough so that there is no lack of free segments in the logical partition during SSD’s lifespan. This allows the filesystem to write the updates in append-only fashion without reclaiming the invalid filesystem blocks. We revise the metadata structure of the baseline filesystem, F2FS, so that it can efficiently handle the storage partition with 2^{64} sectors. We develop Interval Mapping to minimize the memory requirement for the LBA-to-PBA translation in FTL. Interval Mapping is a three level mapping tree. It maintains mapping only for actively used filesystem region. With Interval Mapping, the FTL can maintain the mapping for the 2^{64} sector range with almost identical memory requirement with the page mapping whose LBA range is limited by the size of the storage capacity. We implement the IPLFS on Linux kernel 5.11.0 and prototype the Interval Mapping in OpenSSD. By eliminating the filesystem level garbage collection, IPLFS outperforms F2FS by up to 12.8 times (FIO) and 3.73 times (MySQL YCSB A), respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们开发了免于垃圾收集的日志结构文件系统。有两个关键的技术成分：\emph{IPLFS}（用于无限分区的日志结构文件系统）和 \emph{Interval Mapping}（用于无限文件系统分区的节省空间的 LBA 到 PBA 映射）。在IPLFS中，我们将文件系统分区大小与物理存储大小分开，并将逻辑分区的大小设置得足够大，以便在SSD的生命周期内逻辑分区中不会缺少空闲段。这允许文件系统以仅附加方式写入更新，而无需回收无效的文件系统块。我们修改了基线文件系统F2FS的元数据结构，使其能够有效地处理具有2^{64}扇区的存储分区。我们开发间隔映射来最大限度地减少 FTL 中 LBA 到 PBA 转换的内存需求。区间映射是一个三级映射树。它仅维护活跃使用的文件系统区域的映射。通过间隔映射，FTL 可以维护 2^{64} 扇区范围的映射，其内存要求与 LBA 范围受存储容量大小限制的页映射几乎相同。我们在 Linux 内核 5.11.0 上实现了 IPLFS，并在 OpenSSD 中构建了间隔映射原型。通过消除文件系统级垃圾收集，IPLFS 的性能分别比 F2FS 提高了 12.8 倍 (FIO) 和 3.73 倍 (MySQL YCSB A)。

papers.title: JITServer: Disaggregated Caching JIT Compiler for the JVM in the Cloud.
papers.abstract: Managed runtimes such as the Java virtual machine (JVM) rely on just-in-time (JIT) compilers to improve application performance by converting bytecodes into optimized machine code. Unfortunately, JIT compilation introduces significant CPU and memory runtime overheads. JIT compiler disaggregation is a technique that decouples the JIT from the JVM and ships compilation to a separate remote process. JIT disaggregation reduces overall memory usage; however, its communication overheads result in higher system-wide CPU usage. JITServer is a disaggregated caching JIT compiler we implemented in the Eclipse OpenJ9 JVM. It improves system-wide resource utilization by enabling the caching of compiled native code and its reuse in JVMs running on different machines. JITServer is transparent to the application developer, and supports all the dynamic features in the JVM specification. In our experiments, JITServer reduced overall CPU cost by up to 77%, overall memory usage by up to 62%, application start time by up to 58% and warm-up time by up to 87%.
papers.abstract_zh: Java 虚拟机 (JVM) 等托管运行时依赖即时 (JIT) 编译器，通过将字节码转换为优化的机器代码来提高应用程序性能。不幸的是，JIT 编译会带来大量的 CPU 和内存运行时开销。 JIT 编译器分解是一种将 JIT 与 JVM 解耦并将编译传送到单独的远程进程的技术。 JIT 分解减少了总体内存使用量；然而，其通信开销会导致系统范围内的 CPU 使用率更高。 JITServer 是我们在 Eclipse OpenJ9 JVM 中实现的分解缓存 JIT 编译器。它通过缓存已编译的本机代码并在不同机器上运行的 JVM 中重用，提高了系统范围的资源利用率。 JITServer 对应用程序开发人员来说是透明的，并且支持 JVM 规范中的所有动态功能。在我们的实验中，JITServer 将总体 CPU 成本降低了 77%，总体内存使用量降低了 62%，应用程序启动时间缩短了 58%，预热时间缩短了 87%。

papers.title: KRCORE: A Microsecond-scale RDMA Control Plane for Elastic Computing.
papers.abstract: We present KRCORE, an RDMA library with a microsecond-scale control plane on commodity RDMA hardware for elastic computing. KRCORE can establish a full-fledged RDMA connection within 10μs (hundreds or thousands of times faster than verbs), while only maintaining a (small) fixed-sized connection metadata at each node, regardless of the cluster scale. The key ideas include virtualizing pre-initialized kernel-space RDMA connections instead of creating one from scratch, and retrofitting advanced RDMA dynamic connected transport with static transport for both low connection overhead and high networking speed. Under load spikes, KRCORE can shorten the worker bootstrap time of an existing disaggregated key-value store (namely RACE Hashing) by 83%. In serverless computing (namely Fn), KRCORE can also reduce the latency for transferring data through RDMA by 99%.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 KRCORE，这是一个 RDMA 库，在商品 RDMA 硬件上具有微秒级控制平面，用于弹性计算。 KRCORE 可以在 10μs 内建立成熟的 RDMA 连接（比动词快数百或数千倍），同时仅在每个节点维护（小型）固定大小的连接元数据，无论集群规模如何。关键思想包括虚拟化预初始化的内核空间 RDMA 连接，而不是从头开始创建连接，以及用静态传输改造先进的 RDMA 动态连接传输，以实现低连接开销和高网络速度。在负载峰值下，KRCORE 可以将现有分类键值存储（即 RACE Hashing）的工作进程引导时间缩短 83%。在无服务器计算（即Fn）中，KRCORE还可以将通过RDMA传输数据的延迟降低99%。

papers.title: KSG: Augmenting Kernel Fuzzing with System Call Specification Generation.
papers.abstract: Kernel fuzzing is a dynamic testing technique that has successfully found numerous kernel vulnerabilities. However, existing kernel fuzzers, such as Syzkaller, depend on system call specifications to generate test cases. Writing such specifications requires an immense amount of domain knowledge while being extremely laborious. Meanwhile, automated generation of the specification is still an open problem due to the complexity of the kernel, including entry function extraction and input type identification. As a result, the current amount of system call information is insufficient to test the entire kernel code base thoroughly. Syzkaller covers an average of 38% of Linux kernel code with current Syzlang specifications for a prolonged time of fuzzing. In this paper, we propose KSG to generate system call specifications for kernel fuzzers automatically. First, it utilizes probe-based tracing to extract entry functions accurately. Then, it uses path-sensitive analysis to collect precise input types and range constraints in each execution path of entry functions. Based on the aforementioned information, KSG generates specifications in the domain language Syzlang, which is used by most kernel fuzzers. We evaluated KSG on several versions of the Linux kernel. It automatically generated 2433 unique specifications. Leveraging the newly generated specifications, Syzkaller and Moonshine achieved coverage improvements of 22% and 23% respectively. Furthermore, our approach assisted fuzzers to discover 26 previously unknown bugs, where 13 and 6 bugs were fixed and assigned with CVEs, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 内核模糊测试是一种动态测试技术，已成功发现大量内核漏洞。然而，现有的内核模糊器（例如 Syzkaller）依赖系统调用规范来生成测试用例。编写这样的规范需要大量的领域知识，而且非常费力。同时，由于内核的复杂性，规范的自动生成仍然是一个悬而未决的问题，包括入口函数提取和输入类型识别。因此，当前的系统调用信息量不足以彻底测试整个内核代码库。 Syzkaller 按照当前 Syzlang 规范平均覆盖了 38% 的 Linux 内核代码，可进行长时间的模糊测试。在本文中，我们提出 KSG 自动生成内核模糊器的系统调用规范。首先，它利用基于探针的跟踪来准确提取入口函数。然后，它使用路径敏感分析来收集入口函数的每个执行路径中的精确输入类型和范围约束。根据上述信息，KSG 使用域语言 Syzlang 生成规范，大多数内核模糊器都使用该语言。我们在多个版本的 Linux 内核上评估了 KSG。它自动生成2433个独特的规格。利用新生成的规范，Syzkaller 和 Moonshine 的覆盖率分别提高了 22% 和 23%。此外，我们的方法帮助模糊器发现了 26 个以前未知的错误，其中分别修复了 13 个和 6 个错误并分配了 CVE。

papers.title: Margaret Martonosi, National Science Foundation.
papers.abstract: The United States National Science Foundation (NSF) supports a majority of US academic research in the Computer and Information Science and Engineering (CISE) topic areas. A long-time computing researcher herself, Dr. Margaret Martonosi is now serving a 4-year term leading the NSF CISE Directorate, and stewarding the CISE directorate’s $1B+ annual budget on behalf of research, education, workforce, and infrastructure funding in CISE topic areas and for science as a whole. In this talk, she will discuss key themes for the field, how CISE is developing programmatic opportunities to advance research related to them, and also how CISE invests in cross-cutting people issues for the field as well. More broadly, she will discuss CISE and NSF in the context of the global research efforts, and our approach to industry and international research partnerships. Across it all, she will note how the ATC/OSDI community can contribute to these efforts and priorities.
papers.abstract_zh: 美国国家科学基金会 (NSF) 支持美国计算机和信息科学与工程 (CISE) 主题领域的大部分学术研究。 Margaret Martonosi 博士本身就是一名长期的计算机研究员，目前担任 NSF CISE 理事会的领导职务，任期 4 年，并代表 CISE 主题领域和整个科学领域的研究、教育、劳动力和基础设施资金管理 CISE 理事会 10 亿美元以上的年度预算。在本次演讲中，她将讨论该领域的关键主题、CISE 如何开发计划性机会来推进与其相关的研究，以及 CISE 如何投资于该领域的跨领域人员问题。更广泛地说，她将在全球研究工作的背景下讨论 CISE 和 NSF，以及我们与行业和国际研究伙伴关系的方法。在这一切中，她将指出 ATC/OSDI 社区如何为这些努力和优先事项做出贡献。

papers.title: Meces: Latency-efficient Rescaling via Prioritized State Migration for Stateful Distributed Stream Processing Systems.
papers.abstract: Stateful distributed stream processing engines (SPEs) usually call for dynamic rescaling due to varying workloads. However, existing state migration approaches suffer from latency spikes, or high resource usage, or major disruptions as they ignore the order of state migration during rescaling. This paper reveals the importance of state migration order to the latency performance in SPEs. Based on that, we propose Meces, an on-the-fly state migration mechanism which prioritizes the state migration of hot keys (those being processed or about to be processed by downstream operator tasks) to achieve smooth rescaling. Meces leverages a fetch-on-demand design which migrates operator states at record-granularity for state consistency. We further devise a hierarchical state data structure and gradual strategy for migration efficiency. Meces is implemented on Apache Flink and evaluated with diversified benchmarks and scenarios. Compared to state-of-the-art approaches, Meces improves stream processing performance in terms of latency and throughput during rescaling by orders of magnitude, with negligible overhead and no disruption to non-rescaling periods.
papers.abstract_zh: 有状态分布式流处理引擎 (SPE) 通常会因工作负载的变化而需要动态重新缩放。然而，现有的状态迁移方法会遇到延迟峰值、资源使用率高或严重中断的问题，因为它们忽略了重新缩放期间状态迁移的顺序。本文揭示了状态迁移顺序对 SPE 延迟性能的重要性。基于此，我们提出了Meces，一种动态状态迁移机制，它优先考虑热键（下游算子任务正在处理或即将处理的热键）的状态迁移，以实现平滑的重新缩放。 Meces 利用按需获取设计，以记录粒度迁移操作符状态以实现状态一致性。我们进一步设计了分层状态数据结构和渐进策略以提高迁移效率。 Meces 在 Apache Flink 上实现，并通过多样化的基准和场景进行评估。与最先进的方法相比，Meces 将重新缩放期间的延迟和吞吐量方面的流处理性能提高了几个数量级，且开销可以忽略不计，并且不会对非重新缩放周期造成干扰。

papers.title: Memory Harvesting in Multi-GPU Systems with Hierarchical Unified Virtual Memory.
papers.abstract: With the ever-growing demands for GPUs, most organizations allow users to share the multi-GPU servers. However, we observe that the memory space across GPUs is not effectively utilized enough when consolidating various workloads that exhibit highly varying resource demands. This is because the current memory management techniques were designed solely for individual GPUs rather than shared multi-GPU environments. This study introduces a novel approach to provide an illusion of virtual memory space for GPUs, called hierarchical unified virtual memory (HUVM), by incorporating the temporarily idle memory of neighbor GPUs. Since modern GPUs are connected to each other through a fast interconnect, it provides lower access latency to neighbor GPU's memory compared to the host memory via PCIe. On top of HUVM, we design a new memory manager, called memHarvester, to effectively and efficiently harvest the temporarily available neighbor GPUs’ memory. For diverse consolidation scenarios with DNN training and graph analytics workloads, our experimental result shows up to 2.71x performance improvement compared to the prior approach in multi-GPU environments.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着对 GPU 的需求不断增长，大多数组织允许用户共享多 GPU 服务器。然而，我们观察到，在整合资源需求差异很大的各种工作负载时，跨 GPU 的内存空间没有得到充分有效的利用。这是因为当前的内存管理技术是专门为单个 GPU 而设计的，而不是为共享的多 GPU 环境而设计的。本研究引入了一种新颖的方法，通过合并相邻 GPU 的临时空闲内存，为 GPU 提供虚拟内存空间的幻象，称为分层统一虚拟内存 (HUVM)。由于现代 GPU 通过快速互连相互连接，因此与通过 PCIe 访问主机内存相比，它对相邻 GPU 内存的访问延迟更低。在 HUVM 之上，我们设计了一个新的内存管理器，称为 memHarvester，以有效且高效地收集临时可用的相邻 GPU 的内存。对于具有 DNN 训练和图形分析工作负载的多种整合场景，我们的实验结果显示，与多 GPU 环境中的先前方法相比，性能提升高达 2.71 倍。

papers.title: Modulo: Finding Convergence Failure Bugs in Distributed Systems with Divergence Resync Models.
papers.abstract: While there exist many consistency models for distributed systems, most of those models seek to provide the basic guarantee of convergence: given enough time and no further inputs, all replicas in the system should eventually converge to the same state. However, because of Convergence Failure Bugs (CFBs), many distributed systems do not provide even this basic guarantee. The violation of the convergence property can be crucial to safety-critical applications collectively working together with a shared distributed system. Indeed, many CFBs are reported as major issues by developers. Our key insight is that CFBs are caused by divergence, or differences between the state of replicas, and that a focused exploration of divergence states can reveal bugs in the convergence logic of real distributed systems while avoiding state explosion. Based on this insight, we have designed and implemented Modulo, the first Model-Based Testing tool using Divergence Resync Models (DRMs) to systematically explore divergence and convergence in real distributed systems. Modulo uses DRMs to explore an abstract state machine of the system and derive schedules, the intermediate representation of test cases, which are then translated into test inputs and injected into systems under test (SUTs). We ran Modulo to check ZooKeeper, MongoDB, and Redis and found 11 bugs (including 6 previously unknown ones)
papers.abstract_zh: 虽然分布式系统存在许多一致性模型，但大多数模型都寻求提供收敛的基本保证：给定足够的时间并且没有进一步的输入，系统中的所有副本最终应该收敛到相同的状态。然而，由于收敛失败错误（CFB），许多分布式系统甚至不提供这种基本保证。违反收敛性对于与共享分布式系统一起工作的安全关键型应用程序至关重要。事实上，许多 CFB 被开发商报告为主要问题。我们的主要见解是，CFB 是由副本状态之间的发散或差异引起的，对发散状态的集中探索可以揭示真实分布式系统收敛逻辑中的错误，同时避免状态爆炸。基于这一见解，我们设计并实现了 Modulo，这是第一个使用发散重新同步模型 (DRM) 的基于模型的测试工具，用于系统地探索真实分布式系统中的发散和收敛。 Modulo 使用 DRM 来探索系统的抽象状态机并导出计划（测试用例的中间表示），然后将其转换为测试输入并注入到被测系统 (SUT) 中。我们运行 Modulo 来检查 ZooKeeper、MongoDB 和 Redis，发现了 11 个错误（包括 6 个以前未知的错误）

papers.title: Not that Simple: Email Delivery in the 21st Century.
papers.abstract: Over the past two decades, the number of RFCs related to email and its security has exploded from below 100 to nearly 500. This embedded the Simple Mail Transfer Protocol (SMTP) into a tree of interdependent and delivery-relevant standards. In this paper, we investigate how far real-world deployments keep up with this increasing complexity of delivery- and security options. To gain an in-depth picture of email delivery apart from the giants in the ecosystem (Gmail, Outlook, etc.), we engage people to send emails to eleven differently configured target domains. Our measurements allow us to evaluate core aspects of email delivery, including security features, DNS configuration, and IP version support on the sending side across different types of providers. We find that novel technologies are often insufficiently supported, even by large providers. For example, while 65.4\% of email providers can resolve hosts via IPv6, only 44.3\% can also deliver emails via IPv6. Concerning security features, we observe that less than half (41.5\%) of all providers rely on DNSSEC validating resolvers, and encryption is mostly opportunistic, with 89.7\% of providers accepting invalid certificates. TLSA, as a DNS-based certificate verification method, is only used by 31.7\% of the providers in our study. Finally, we turned our eye to the impact modern standards have on unsolicited bulk email (SPAM). We found that greylisting is effective, reducing the SPAM volume by roughly half while not impacting regular delivery. However, and interestingly, SPAM delivery currently seems to focus on plaintext IPv4 connections, making IPv6-only, TLS-enforcing inbound email servers a more effective anti-SPAM measure – even though it also means rejecting a major portion of legitimate emails.
papers.abstract_zh: 在过去的二十年中，与电子邮件及其安全性相关的 RFC 数量已从不到 100 个激增至近 500 个。这将简单邮件传输协议 (SMTP) 嵌入到相互依赖且与交付相关的标准树中。在本文中，我们研究了现实世界的部署在多大程度上跟上日益复杂的交付和安全选项的步伐。为了深入了解生态系统中的巨头（Gmail、Outlook 等）之外的电子邮件传送情况，我们让人们将电子邮件发送到 11 个不同配置的目标域。我们的测量使我们能够评估电子邮件传送的核心方面，包括安全功能、DNS 配置以及不同类型提供商的发送端的 IP 版本支持。我们发现，新技术往往得不到足够的支持，即使是大型提供商也是如此。例如，虽然 65.4% 的电子邮件提供商可以通过 IPv6 解析主机，但只有 44.3% 的电子邮件提供商也可以通过 IPv6 传送电子邮件。关于安全功能，我们观察到不到一半 (41.5%) 的提供商依赖 DNSSEC 验证解析器，并且加密大多是机会性的，89.7% 的提供商接受无效证书。 TLSA 作为一种基于 DNS 的证书验证方法，在我们的研究中仅 31.7% 的提供商使用。最后，我们将目光转向现代标准对未经请求的批量电子邮件 (SPAM) 的影响。我们发现灰名单是有效的，可以将垃圾邮件数量减少大约一半，同时不影响正常投递。然而，有趣的是，垃圾邮件传送目前似乎专注于纯文本 IPv4 连接，使得仅 IPv6、强制 TLS 的入站电子邮件服务器成为更有效的反垃圾邮件措施，尽管这也意味着拒绝大部分合法电子邮件。

papers.title: NVMe SSD Failures in the Field: the Fail-Stop and the Fail-Slow.
papers.abstract: NVMe SSD has become a staple in modern datacenters thanks to its high throughput and ultra-low latency. Despite its popularity, the reliability of NVMe SSD under mass deployment remains unknown. In this paper, we collect logs from over one million NVMe SSDs deployed at Alibaba, and conduct extensive analysis. From the study, we identify a series of major reliability changes in NVMe SSD. On the good side, NVMe SSD becomes more resilient to early failures and variances of access patterns. On the bad side, NVMe SSD becomes more vulnerable to complicated correlated failures. More importantly, we discover that the ultra-low latency nature makes NVMe SSD much more likely to be impacted by fail-slow failures.
papers.abstract_zh: 凭借其高吞吐量和超低延迟，NVMe SSD 已成为现代数据中心的主要产品。尽管 NVMe SSD 很受欢迎，但大规模部署下的可靠性仍然未知。在本文中，我们收集了阿里巴巴部署的超过一百万个 NVMe SSD 的日志，并进行了广泛的分析。从研究中，我们发现了 NVMe SSD 的一系列主要可靠性变化。从好的方面来说，NVMe SSD 对于早期故障和访问模式的变化变得更有弹性。不利的一面是，NVMe SSD 更容易受到复杂的相关故障的影响。更重要的是，我们发现超低延迟特性使得 NVMe SSD 更容易受到慢速故障的影响。

papers.title: Pacman: An Efficient Compaction Approach for Log-Structured Key-Value Store on Persistent Memory.
papers.abstract: Recent persistent memory (PM) key-value (KV) stores adopt the log-structured approach to reap PM’s full potential. However, they fail to sustain high performance at high capacity utilization due to inefficient compaction. The inefficiency results from the unawareness of PM’s characteristics. This paper proposes Pacman, an efficient PM-aware compaction approach for log-structured KV stores on PM. Pacman (1) offloads reference search during compaction to service threads, so as to mitigate the onerous index traversal overhead, (2) leverages tagged pointer and DRAM-resident compaction information to avoid excessive PM accesses introduced by garbage collection, (3) redesigns the compaction pipeline based on the PM peculiarities to lower the persistence overhead, and (4) separates hot and cold objects in a lightweight manner to reduce PM data copying in compaction. We apply Pacman to state-of-the-art PM-based log-structured KV stores and evaluate Pacman using various benchmarks. Our evaluations show that Pacman curtails the performance degradation at high capacity utilization, increases the compaction bandwidth by 2-4×, and boosts the performance of the state-of-the-art systems by 1.5-1.8× under write-intensive workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近的持久内存 (PM) 键值 (KV) 存储采用日志结构方法来充分发挥 PM 的潜力。然而，由于压缩效率低下，它们无法在高容量利用率下维持高性能。效率低下是由于不了解 PM 的特征造成的。本文提出了 Pacman，这是一种高效的 PM 感知压缩方法，用于 PM 上的日志结构 KV 存储。 Pacman (1) 将压缩过程中的引用搜索卸载到服务线程，以减轻繁重的索引遍历开销，(2) 利用标记指针和 DRAM 驻留压缩信息来避免垃圾收集引入的过多 PM 访问，(3) 根据 PM 特性重新设计压缩管道，以降低持久性开销，(4) 以轻量级方式分离冷热对象，以减少压缩中的 PM 数据复制。我们将 Pacman 应用于最先进的基于 PM 的日志结构 KV 存储，并使用各种基准评估 Pacman。我们的评估表明，Pacman 减少了高容量利用率下的性能下降，将压缩带宽提高了 2-4 倍，并将写入密集型工作负载下最先进系统的性能提高了 1.5-1.8 倍。

papers.title: PetS: A Unified Framework for Parameter-Efficient Transformers Serving.
papers.abstract: Deploying large-scale Transformer models under the conventional pre-train-then-fine-tune paradigm is impractical for multi-task serving, because a full model copy for each downstream task must be maintained, quickly exhausting the storage budget. Recent algorithmic advances in Parameter-Efficient Transformers (PETs) have shown enormous potential to mitigate the storage overhead. They share the pre-trained model among tasks and only fine-tune a small portion of task-specific parameters. Unfortunately, existing serving systems neither have flexible PET task management mechanisms nor can efficiently serve queries to different tasks in batches. Therefore, we propose PetS, the first unified framework for multi-task PETs serving. Specifically, different PET tasks are expressed by a unified representation in the same framework, which enables flexible PET tasks management. Based on the unified representation, we design a specialized PET inference engine to batch different tasks' queries together and execute them with task-agnostic shared operators and task-specific PET operators. To further improve system throughput, we propose a coordinated batching strategy to deal with arbitrary input queries. We also develop a PET operator scheduling strategy to exploit parallelism between PET tasks. Comprehensive experiments on Edge/Desktop/Server GPUs demonstrate that PetS supports up to 25 times more concurrent tasks and improves the serving throughput by 1.53 times and 1.63 times on Desktop and Server GPUs, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 在传统的预训练然后微调范例下部署大规模 Transformer 模型对于多任务服务来说是不切实际的，因为必须维护每个下游任务的完整模型副本，从而很快耗尽存储预算。参数高效变压器 (PET) 的最新算法进展显示出减少存储开销的巨大潜力。他们在任务之间共享预先训练的模型，并且只微调一小部分特定于任务的参数。不幸的是，现有的服务系统既没有灵活的PET任务管理机制，也不能高效地批量服务于不同任务的查询。因此，我们提出了 PetS，这是第一个多任务 PET 服务的统一框架。具体来说，不同的PET任务在同一框架中通过统一的表示来表达，从而实现灵活的PET任务管理。基于统一表示，我们设计了一个专门的 PET 推理引擎，将不同任务的查询一起批处理，并使用与任务无关的共享运算符和特定于任务的 PET 运算符来执行它们。为了进一步提高系统吞吐量，我们提出了一种协调批处理策略来处理任意输入查询。我们还开发了 PET 操作员调度策略来利用 PET 任务之间的并行性。在边缘/桌面/服务器 GPU 上的综合实验表明，PetS 支持最多 25 倍的并发任务，并将桌面和服务器 GPU 上的服务吞吐量分别提高了 1.53 倍和 1.63 倍。

papers.title: PilotFish: Harvesting Free Cycles of Cloud Gaming with Deep Learning Training.
papers.abstract: Cloud gaming services have become important workloads in cloud datacenter. However, our investigation shows that a cloud gaming service cannot saturate the modern cloud GPUs. One way to improve the GPU utilization is to co-locate multiple workloads within one GPU, which is challenging for cloud gaming due to its highly fluctuated and unpredictable GPU usage pattern. In this paper, we present PilotFish, a high-performance system that harvests the free GPU cycles of cloud gaming with deep learning (DL) training, while incurring almost zero interference to cloud gaming. We co-locate DL training jobs with cloud gaming because they have stable and predictable workloads and have no strict latency requirement. In more detail, Pilotfish captures the idle periods of the game's GPU usage with its low-overhead instrumentation to graphic libraries in sub-millisecond granularity. To avoid the potential interference to cloud gaming, PilotFish schedules training computation kernels only when they can finish before the idle GPU periods, and preempts straggler kernels running longer than expected. Our evaluation on popular cloud games and DL models shows PilotFish can harvest up to 85.1% of the idle GPU time from cloud gaming with no interference.
papers.abstract_zh: 云游戏服务已成为云数据中心的重要工作负载。然而，我们的调查表明，云游戏服务无法满足现代云 GPU 的需求。提高 GPU 利用率的一种方法是在一个 GPU 中并置多个工作负载，这对于云游戏来说是一个挑战，因为其 GPU 使用模式高度波动且不可预测。在本文中，我们介绍了 PilotFish，这是一种高性能系统，通过深度学习 (DL) 训练收获云游戏的免费 G​​PU 周期，同时对云游戏几乎零干扰。我们将深度学习训练作业与云游戏放在一起，因为它们具有稳定且可预测的工作负载，并且没有严格的延迟要求。更详细地说，Pilotfish 通过其低开销仪器以亚毫秒粒度捕获图形库的游戏 GPU 使用的空闲期。为了避免对云游戏的潜在干扰，PilotFish 仅在训练计算内核能够在空闲 GPU 周期之前完成时才安排训练计算内核，并抢占运行时间超过预期的落后内核。我们对热门云游戏和深度学习模型的评估表明，PilotFish 可以在不受干扰的情况下从云游戏中收获高达 85.1% 的空闲 GPU 时间。

papers.title: PRIDWEN: Universally Hardening SGX Programs via Load-Time Synthesis.
papers.abstract: A growing class of threats to Intel Software Guard Extensions (SGX) is Side-Channel Attacks (SCAs). As a response, numerous countermeasures have been proposed. However, it is hard to incorporate them to protect SGX programs against multiple SCAs simultaneously. A naive combination of distinct countermeasures does not work in practice because some of them are 1) undeployable in target environments lacking dependent hardware features, 2) redundant if there are already defenses with similar functionalities, and 3) incompatible with each other by design or implementation. Identifying all of such conditions and preparing potential workarounds before deployment are challenging, primarily when an SGX program targets multiple platforms that abstract or manipulate their configurations. Pridwen is a framework that selectively applies essential SCA countermeasures when loading an SGX program based on the configurations of the target execution platform. Pridwen allows a developer to deploy a program in the form of WebAssembly (Wasm). Upon receiving a Wasm binary, Pridwen probes the current hardware configuration, synthesizes a program (i.e., a native binary) with an optimal set of countermeasures, and validates the final binary. Pridwen supports both software-only and hardware-assisted countermeasures, and our evaluations show Pridwen efficiently, faithfully synthesizes multiple benchmark programs and real-world applications while securing them against multiple SCAs.
papers.abstract_zh: 英特尔软件防护扩展 (SGX) 面临的越来越多的威胁是侧通道攻击 (SCA)。作为回应，人们提出了许多对策。然而，很难将它们合并起来以同时保护 SGX 程序免受多个 SCA 的侵害。不同对策的简单组合在实践中行不通，因为其中一些对策：1）在缺乏依赖硬件功能的目标环境中无法部署，2）如果已经存在具有类似功能的防御措施，则它们是多余的，3）在设计或实现上彼此不兼容。在部署之前识别所有此类条件并准备潜在的解决方法具有挑战性，尤其是当 SGX 程序针对抽象或操纵其配置的多个平台时。 Pridwen 是一个框架，可根据目标执行平台的配置在加载 SGX 程序时选择性地应用基本的 SCA 对策。 Pridwen 允许开发人员以 WebAssembly (Wasm) 的形式部署程序。收到 Wasm 二进制文件后，Pridwen 会探测当前的硬件配置，用一组最佳对策合成程序（即本机二进制文件），并验证最终的二进制文件。 Pridwen 支持纯软件和硬件辅助对策，我们的评估表明 Pridwen 有效、忠实地综合了多个基准程序和实际应用程序，同时保护它们免受多个 SCA 的影响。

papers.title: Primo: Practical Learning-Augmented Systems with Interpretable Models.
papers.abstract: While machine learning has demonstrated remarkable performance in various computer systems, some substantial flaws can prohibit its deployment in practice, including opaque decision processes, poor generalization and robustness, as well as exorbitant training and inference overhead. Motivated by these deficiencies, we introduce Primo, a unified framework for developers to design practical learning-augmented systems. Specifically, (1) Primo provides two interpretable models ( PrAM and PrDT ), as well as a Distill Engine , to support different system scenarios and deployment requirements. (2) It adopts Bayes Optimization to automatically identify the optimal model pruning strategy and hyperparameter configuration. (3) It also implements two tools, Monotonic Constraint and Counterfactual Explanation , to achieve transparent debugging and guided model adjustment. Primo can be applied to different types of learning-augmented systems. Evaluations on three state-of-the-art systems show that Primo can provide clear model interpretations, better system performance, and lower deployment costs.
papers.abstract_zh: 虽然机器学习在各种计算机系统中表现出了卓越的性能，但一些重大缺陷可能会阻碍其在实践中的部署，包括不透明的决策过程、较差的泛化性和鲁棒性，以及过高的训练和推理开销。鉴于这些缺陷，我们推出了 Primo，这是一个供开发人员设计实用的学习增强系统的统一框架。具体来说，（1）Primo提供了两种可解释的模型（PrAM和PrDT），以及一个Distill Engine，以支持不同的系统场景和部署要求。 (2)采用贝叶斯优化自动识别最优模型剪枝策略和超参数配置。 （3）还实现了单调约束和反事实解释两个工具，实现透明调试和引导模型调整。 Primo 可应用于不同类型的学习增强系统。对三个最先进系统的评估表明，Primo 可以提供清晰的模型解释、更好的系统性能和更低的部署成本。

papers.title: Privbox: Faster System Calls Through Sandboxed Privileged Execution.
papers.abstract: System calls are the main method for applications to request services from the operating system, but their invocation incurs considerable overhead, which has been aggravated by mitigation mechanisms for transient execution attacks. Proposed approaches for reducing system call overhead all break the semantic equivalence between system calls and regular function calls (e.g., by making system calls asynchronous), and so their adoption requires rearchitecting applications. This paper proposes \emph{Privbox}, a new approach for lightweight system calls that maintains the familiar synchronous, function-like system call model. Privbox allows an application to execute system call-intensive code in a \emph{semi-privileged, sandboxed} execution mode, called a 'privbox'. Semi-privileged execution is architecturally similar to the kernel's privileged execution, which enables faster invocation of system calls, but the code is sandboxed to ensure that it cannot use its elevated privileges to compromise the system. We further propose \emph{semi-privileged access prevention} (SPAP), a simple hardware architectural feature that alleviates much of Privbox's instrumentation overhead. We implement Privbox based on Linux and LLVM. Our evaluation on x86 (Intel Skylake) hardware shows that Privbox (1) speeds up system call invocation by 2.2 times; (2) can increase throughput of I/O-threaded applications by up to 1.7 times; and (3) can increase the throughput of real-world workloads such as Redis by up to 7.6% and 11%, without and with SPAP, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 系统调用是应用程序向操作系统请求服务的主要方法，但它们的调用会产生相当大的开销，而瞬态执行攻击的缓解机制又加剧了这种开销。所提出的减少系统调用开销的方法都打破了系统调用和常规函数调用之间的语义等价性（例如，通过使系统调用异步），因此它们的采用需要重新架构应用程序。本文提出了 \emph{Privbox}，一种轻量级系统调用的新方法，它维护了熟悉的同步、类似函数的系统调用模型。 Privbox 允许应用程序以\emph{半特权、沙盒}执行模式（称为“privbox”）执行系统调用密集型代码。半特权执行在架构上与内核的特权执行类似，可以更快地调用系统调用，但代码被沙箱化以确保它无法使用其提升的特权来危害系统。我们进一步提出\emph{半特权访问预防}（SPAP），这是一种简单的硬件架构功能，可以减轻 Privbox 的大部分检测开销。我们基于Linux和LLVM实现Privbox。我们对x86（Intel Skylake）硬件的评估表明，Privbox（1）将系统调用调用速度提高了2.2倍； (2) 可以将 I/O 线程应用程序的吞吐量提高最多 1.7 倍； (3) 在不使用和使用 SPAP 的情况下，可以将 Redis 等实际工作负载的吞吐量分别提高最多 7.6% 和 11%。

papers.title: Riker: Always-Correct and Fast Incremental Builds from Simple Specifications.
papers.abstract: Build systems are responsible for building software correctly and quickly. Unfortunately, traditional build tools like make are correct and fast only when developers precisely enumerate dependencies for every incremental build step. Forward build systems improve correctness over traditional build tools by discovering dependencies automatically, but existing forward build tools have two fundamental flaws. First, they are incorrect; existing forward build tools miss dependencies because their models of system state are incomplete. Second, they rely on users to manually specify incremental build steps, increasing the programmer burden for fast builds. This paper introduces Riker, a forward build system that guarantees fast, correct builds. Riker builds are easy to specify; in many cases a single command such as gcc *.c suffices. From these simple specifications, Riker automatically discovers fast incremental rebuild opportunities. Riker models the entire POSIX filesystem—not just files, but directories, pipes, and so on. This model guarantees that every dependency is checked on every build so every output is correct. We use Riker to build 14 open source packages including LLVM and memcached. Riker incurs a median overhead of 8.8% on the initial full build. On average, Riker's incremental builds realize 94% of make's incremental speedup with no manual effort and no risk of errors.
papers.abstract_zh: 构建系统负责正确、快速地构建软件。不幸的是，只有当开发人员精确枚举每个增量构建步骤的依赖关系时，像 make 这样的传统构建工具才能正确且快速。正向构建系统通过自动发现依赖关系来提高传统构建工具的正确性，但现有的正向构建工具有两个基本缺陷。首先，它们是不正确的；现有的正向构建工具缺少依赖项，因为它们的系统状态模型不完整。其次，它们依赖用户手动指定增量构建步骤，增加了程序员快速构建的负担。本文介绍了 Riker，这是一种保证快速、正确构建的正向构建系统。 Riker 构建很容易指定；在许多情况下，单个命令（例如 gcc *.c）就足够了。从这些简单的规范中，Riker 自动发现快速增量重建机会。 Riker 对整个 POSIX 文件系统进行建模——不仅仅是文件，还有目录、管道等等。该模型保证在每次构建时检查每个依赖项，以便每个输出都是正确的。我们使用 Riker 构建了 14 个开源包，包括 LLVM 和 memcached。 Riker 在初始完整构建中产生的平均开销为 8.8%。平均而言，Riker 的增量构建实现了 make 增量加速的 94%，无需手动操作，也没有错误风险。

papers.title: RRC: Responsive Replicated Containers.
papers.abstract: Replication is the basic mechanism for providing application-transparent reliability through fault tolerance. The design and implementation of replication mechanisms is particularly challenging for general multithreaded services, where high latency overhead is not acceptable. Most of the existing replication mechanisms fail to meet this challenge. RRC is a fully-operational fault tolerance mechanism for multiprocessor workloads, based on container replication. It minimizes the latency overhead during normal operation by addressing two key sources of this overhead: (1) it decouples the latency overhead from checkpointing frequency using a hybrid of checkpointing and replay, and (2) it minimizes the pause time for checkpointing by forking a clone of the container to be checkpointed, thus allowing execution to proceed in parallel with checkpointing. The fact that RRC is based on checkpointing makes it inherently less vulnerable to data races than active replication. In addition, RRC includes mechanisms that further reduce the vulnerability to data races, resulting in high recovery rates, as long as the rate of manifested data races is low. The evaluation includes measurement of the recovery rate and recovery latency based on thousands of fault injections. On average, RRC delays responses to clients by less than 400mu's and recovers in less than 1s. The average pause latency is less than 3.3ms. For a set of eight real-world benchmarks, if data races are eliminated, the performance overhead of RRC is under 48%.
papers.abstract_zh: 复制是通过容错提供应用程序透明可靠性的基本机制。复制机制的设计和实现对于一般的多线程服务来说尤其具有挑战性，因为高延迟开销是不可接受的。大多数现有的复制机制无法应对这一挑战。 RRC 是一种基于容器复制的、针对多处理器工作负载的完全可操作的容错机制。它通过解决此开销的两个关键来源来最大限度地减少正常操作期间的延迟开销：（1）它使用检查点和重放的混合方式将延迟开销与检查点频率解耦；（2）它通过分叉要设置检查点的容器的克隆来最大限度地减少检查点的暂停时间，从而允许执行与检查点并行进行。 RRC 基于检查点的事实使其本质上比主动复制更不易受到数据争用的影响。此外，RRC 还包括进一步减少数据争用漏洞的机制，只要表现出的数据争用率较低，即可实现高恢复率。评估包括基于数千次故障注入的恢复率和恢复延迟的测量。平均而言，RRC 对客户端的响应延迟小于 400mu，恢复时间小于 1s。平均暂停延迟小于3.3ms。对于一组八个真实世界基准，如果消除数据竞争，RRC 的性能开销将低于 48%。

papers.title: RunD: A Lightweight Secure Container Runtime for High-density Deployment and High-concurrency Startup in Serverless Computing.
papers.abstract: The secure container that hosts a single container in a micro virtual machine (VM) is now used in serverless computing, as the containers are isolated through the microVMs. There are high demands on the high-density container deployment and high-concurrency container startup to improve both the resource utilization and user experience, as user functions are fine-grained in serverless platforms. Our investigation shows that the entire software stacks, containing the cgroups in the host operating system, the guest operating system, and the container rootfs for the function workload, together result in low deployment density and slow startup performance at high-concurrency. We therefore propose and implement a lightweight secure container runtime, named RunD, to resolve the above problems through a holistic guest-to-host solution. With RunD, over 200 secure containers can be started in a second, and over 2500 secure containers can be deployed on a node with 384GB of memory. RunD is adopted as Alibaba serverless container runtime to support high-density deployment and high-concurrency startup.
papers.abstract_zh: 在微虚拟机 (VM) 中托管单个容器的安全容器现在用于无服务器计算，因为容器通过微虚拟机进行隔离。 Serverless平台的用户功能细粒度化，对高密度容器部署、高并发容器启动提出了很高的要求，以提高资源利用率和用户体验。我们的调查显示，整个软件堆栈，包括主机操作系统中的cgroup、客户操作系统以及用于功能工作负载的容器rootfs，共同导致部署密度低，高并发时启动性能慢。因此，我们提出并实现了一个轻量级安全容器运行时，名为 RunD，通过整体的来宾到主机解决方案来解决上述问题。通过RunD，可以秒启动超过200个安全容器，在384GB内存的节点上可以部署超过2500个安全容器。采用RunD作为阿里巴巴无服务器容器运行时，支持高密度部署和高并发启动。

papers.title: Secure and Lightweight Deduplicated Storage via Shielded Deduplication-Before-Encryption.
papers.abstract: Outsourced storage should fulfill confidentiality and storage efficiency for large-scale data management. Conventional approaches often combine encryption and deduplication based on deduplication-after-encryption (DaE), which first performs encryption followed by deduplication on encrypted data. We argue that DaE has fundamental limitations that lead to various drawbacks in performance, storage savings, and security in secure deduplication systems. In this paper, we study an unexplored paradigm called deduplication-before-encryption (DbE), which first performs deduplication and encrypts only non-duplicate data. DbE has the benefits of mitigating the performance and storage penalties caused by the management of duplicate data, but its deduplication process is no longer protected by encryption. To this end, we design DEBE, a shielded DbE-based deduplicated storage system that protects deduplication via Intel SGX. DEBE builds on frequency-based deduplication that first removes duplicates of frequent data in a space-constrained SGX enclave and then removes all remaining duplicates outside the enclave. Experiments show that DEBE outperforms state-of-the-art DaE approaches.
papers.abstract_zh: 外包存储应满足大规模数据管理的保密性和存储效率。传统方法通常基于加密后重复数据删除（DaE）将加密和重复数据删除相结合，首先对加密数据执行加密，然后再进行重复数据删除。我们认为 DaE 具有根本性的局限性，导致安全重复数据删除系统在性能、存储节省和安全性方面存在各种缺陷。在本文中，我们研究了一种未被探索的范例，称为加密前重复数据删除（DbE），它首先执行重复数据删除并仅加密非重复数据。 DbE 的优点是可以减轻因管理重复数据而造成的性能和存储损失，但其重复数据删除过程不再受加密保护。为此，我们设计了DEBE，一种基于DbE的屏蔽式重复数据删除存储系统，通过Intel SGX保护重复数据删除。 DEBE 基于基于频率的重复数据删除，首先删除空间有限的 SGX enclave 中频繁数据的重复项，然后删除 enclave 外部的所有剩余重复项。实验表明 DEBE 的性能优于最先进的 DaE 方法。

papers.title: Serving Heterogeneous Machine Learning Models on Multi-GPU Servers with Spatio-Temporal Sharing.
papers.abstract: As machine learning (ML) techniques are applied to a widening range of applications, high throughput ML inference serving has become critical for online services. Such ML inference servers with multiple GPUs pose new challenges in the scheduler design. First, they must provide a bounded latency for each request to support a consistent service-level objective (SLO). Second, they must be able to serve multiple heterogeneous ML models in a system, as cloud-based consolidation improves system utilization. To address the two requirements of ML inference servers, this paper proposes a new inference scheduling framework for multi-model ML inference servers. The paper shows that with SLO constraints, GPUs with growing parallelism are not fully utilized for ML inference tasks. To maximize the resource efficiency of GPUs, a key mechanism proposed in this paper is to exploit hardware support for spatial partitioning of GPU resources. With spatio-temporal sharing, a new abstraction layer of GPU resources is created with configurable GPU resources.
